title: Remote Operations Assistant
description:
Who we are?



We are Worn Flower and Gas & Grain, two design-forward retail brands based in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho (USA). We build and operate:



Worn Flower, a high-quality craft tea house located in downtown Coeur d'Alene with a strong focus on quality, hospitality, and intentional product design



Gas & Grain, an Americana-inspired vintage clothing brand located in downtown Coeur d'Alene that prioritizes quality, heritage design, and American-made goods



As both brands grow, we're looking to bring on someone who can help bring clarity, structure, and follow-through to our internal operations.



The role

We're hiring a part-time, remote Operations Assistant to help bring structure, clarity, and accountability to our day-to-day operations.



Your primary focus will be:

-Helping organize weekly and monthly priorities

-Keeping tasks visible and on track

-Ensuring important work doesn't fall through the cracks



This role is less about managing people and more about keeping work organized, moving, and completed.



Key responsibilities

Operations & task management

•Organize and maintain task boards (Asana)

•Identify priorities and next actions

•Track progress, deadlines, and blockers

•Ensure tasks are clear, assigned, and moving forward



Administrative support

•Assist with inbox and communication organization

•Support scheduling and calendar coordination

•Help with follow-ups and reminders



Accountability & visibility

•Help the team stay aligned on priorities

•Follow up on incomplete or delayed tasks

•Ensure key items 
s, social posts, partnerships, etc.) are not missed



Tools you'll use

•Slack 

•Asana 

•Google Workspace



Who this is for?

•Experience in admin, operations, or coordination roles

•Strong organization and follow-through

•Comfortable working independently

•Clear written communication

•Detail-oriented and proactive

•Comfortable keeping others accountable in a professional way



Work structure

•Part-time, starting around 20 hours/week

•Fully remote

•Flexible hours (with agreed availability)

•Long-term opportunity with potential for growth



Compensation

Starting at $5/hour, with potential to increase based on performance and fit.



How to apply

Please follow these instructions carefully;  attention to detail starts here.

1.Record a 1–3 minute video covering: 

Your name and location

Your relevant experience

Your experience with Asana or similar tools

Why this role interests you



2. Mention the word "Asana" naturally somewhere in your video.

3. Name your video file: FirstName_LastName_OperationsAssistant

4. In your
, include 1–2 sentences about why you enjoy organizing tasks or systems.

5. Use this subject line: Operational Clarity



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys creating structure, keeping work on track, and being a reliable support system behind the scenes. If you take pride in organization and follow-through, we would love to hear from you.

title: Electronics Sourcing Specialist
description:
Looking for a talented Online Arbitrage (OA) Virtual Assistant (VA) for long-term work and growth. We are specifically looking for an Electronics sourcing specialist/expert. We expect you to be pre trained and have prior experience sourcing Electronics.

 

We are a US-based e-commerce company doing multi-millions in sales per year on Amazon. We have been consistently scaling for 5 years. We have a strong and collaborative team that values consistency and results.     

   

POSITION DETAILS:   

- Pay: $1000/month (PHP 60,000) + opportunities for bonuses    

- WORK FROM HOME (flexible schedule)

- Full-time: 40 hours/week

- Pay schedule: Bi-weekly



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Source profitable online arbitrage products for Amazon (manual sourcing)

- Record leads in Google Sheets (clean and organized)

- Evaluate deals quickly and accurately (profitability + competition)



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Amazon Product Sourcing / Deal Sourcing

- SellerAmp / Keepa

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Sourcing Electronics



HOW TO APPLY (5 MINUTES):

Complete the short Google Form below (Bitly link goes to a Google Form). Only google form submissions will be considered.



    

We’re looking for a highly capable sourcing specialist and are prepared to pay competitively for strong performance. Please apply only if you have prior OA experience.



We are hiring ASAP and are looking to get you started within the next 2 weeks. Please do not reply to this post.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor for High Converting Meta Ads
description:
We are hiring a full time Video Editor for an ecommerce brand focused on high converting
 and Instagram ads.



This is not a generic editing role. Your work will directly impact ad performance and revenue.



Each day, you will receive:

• 1 ad script

• Voiceover (already created)

• Product clips



Your job is to turn that into 5 ad variations, each with a different visual hook.



Important:

This is 1 core ad with 5 different hooks, not 5 completely different ads.



?



Daily Output (Monday to Friday):

• 5 ad variations per day

• Fast turnaround, same day delivery



?



Your Responsibilities:

• Review and organize all product footage

• Create high converting video ads for Meta 
 and Instagram)

• Craft strong scroll stopping hooks in the first 1 to 3 seconds

• Edit with clear pacing, cuts, captions, and structure optimized for conversions

• Follow proven direct response ad styles

• Continuously improve based on feedback



?



Trial Task (Required):

Before hiring, you will complete a test task:

• You will receive 1 script, voiceover, and clips

• You will create 3 to 5 variations



This is required so we can evaluate your ability to create converting ads.



?



Requirements:

• Proven experience editing 
 ads for
 or Instagram

• Strong understanding of hooks, retention, and conversion focused creatives

• Ability to follow scripts and execute quickly

• Fast turnaround and reliability

• Good communication and attention to detail

• Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut, After Effects, or similar



?



Bonus (Not Required):

• Experience scaling winning ad creatives

• Understanding of what makes ads convert, not just look good



?



Compensation:

• Full time position

• Paid weekly or monthly

• Competitive salary based on experience, discussed after application



?



How to Apply:

Send:



1. Your portfolio, ecommerce ads only

2. 2 to 3 of your best performing ad creatives

3. What software you use

4. Your internet speed and computer specs

title: Direct Response Ad Script Writer + AI Voiceover
description:
We are hiring a full time Direct Response Script Writer for an ecommerce brand focused on high converting
 and Instagram ads.



This is a performance role. Your scripts will directly impact ad results and revenue.



Each day, you will:

• Write 1 ad script

• Turn it into a natural sounding voiceover using AI (ElevenLabs for example)



You are not writing long form content. You are writing short, high converting ad scripts built for testing.



?



Daily Output (Monday to Friday):

• 1 ad script per day

• 1 complete voiceover using AI (ElevenLabs)



?



Your Responsibilities:

• Write clear, high converting ad scripts for Meta ads

• Create strong hooks that grab attention in the first seconds

• Structure scripts for retention and conversions

• Use ElevenLabs to generate natural, human sounding voiceovers

• Adjust tone, pacing, and delivery to match each angle

• Iterate quickly based on feedback



?



Trial Task (Required):

Before hiring, you will complete a test task:

• You will receive 1 product

• You will write 1 script

• You will generate the voiceover using AI (ElevenLabs)



We are not looking for perfect scripts, we are looking for scripts that can win.



?



Requirements:

• Proven experience in direct response copywriting (ads, not blogs)

• Strong understanding of hooks, pain points, and conversion psychology

• Ability to write fast without overthinking

• Experience using ElevenLabs or similar AI voice tools

• Ability to make voiceovers sound natural and human

• Good communication and reliability



?



Bonus (Not Required):

• Experience writing scripts for ecommerce brands

• Understanding of what makes ads scale on Meta



?



Compensation:

• Full time position

• Paid weekly or monthly

• Competitive salary based on experience



?



How to Apply:

Send:



1. Examples of ad scripts you have written

2. 2 to 3 ads you worked on (if available)

3. Any ElevenLabs or voiceover samples

title: Virtual Assistant - Online Business + Studio Operations Remote
description:
I'm Asha, a healing guide, breathwork facilitator, and retreat curator based in Lisbon, Portugal. I run Asha's Place Lisbon, a healing studio and online business that supports high-achieving women through group programs, private retreats, and digital courses.



My business is growing, and I need someone behind the scenes who can keep things moving while I stay focused on the work I'm here to do.



What you'll actually be doing:

- Formatting and publishing
 newsletters (MailerLite + Mailchimp)

- Managing and updating Airtable databases and automations

- Supporting course and program admin in ThriveCart (product setup, student access, troubleshooting)

- Coordinating online event logistics and studio rental inquiries

- General inbox support and task management



You're the right fit if:

- You have hands-on experience with MailerLite, Mailchimp, Airtable, and ThriveCart — not "I've heard of them," but actually worked in them

- You've supported course creators, coaches, or online business owners before

- You communicate clearly, follow through without being chased, and flag problems early

- You work well independently and don't need micromanaging

- You're comfortable in a small, values-driven business where things move intuitively and not everything is perfectly systematized yet

- Bonus points if you speak Portuguese and/or Spanish - my business operates in Lisbon and serves an international community, so language flexibility is a genuine asset



Details:

- Remote, flexible hours, we'll establish a rhythm together

- Part-time to start, with room to grow

- Compensation: Please include your hourly rate in your application



To apply, send a short message (voice note or written, either is fine) telling me which of these tools you know best and sharing one example of how you've supported an online business owner or course creator. No need to send a formal CV, just show me you know what you're doing.

title: Real Estate Compliance Coordinator
description:
Real Estate Compliance Coordinator | Remote | The Guiding Star LLC 



We’re looking for a detail-focused Real Estate Compliance Coordinator who keeps processes clear, organized, and running smoothly. If you thrive on accuracy, accountability, and making operations seamless, join us and make a meaningful impact.



Key Responsibilities

Document Review & Management

Review contracts, agreements, and internal forms for accuracy and compliance

Maintain a well-organized system for tracking and filing documents across platforms



Compliance Monitoring

Monitor processes to ensure alignment with internal policies and external regulations

Identify potential areas of risk and help implement solutions



Audit Support

Prepare and organize documentation for internal and external audits

Assist in executing post-audit follow-up and corrective actions



Policy Communication & Implementation

Support rollout of company policies and ensure team-wide understanding

Communicate updates and compliance expectations effectively



Recordkeeping & Reporting

Maintain detailed records of compliance reports and regulatory communications

Generate summaries and compliance reports for leadership and department leads

Highlight gaps, trends, or risks that require attention



Cross-Department Collaboration

Work with HR, Legal, Operations, and other departments to align on policy and process documentation

Provide guidance and clarification on compliance-related matters



Minimum Technical Requirements

Processor (CPU): Intel Core i5 (10th gen or newer) or AMD Ryzen 5 (3000 series or newer)

RAM: 8 GB minimum (16 GB recommended)

Storage: 256 GB SSD (minimum)

Operating System: Windows 10/11 (Pro or Home) or macOS

Webcam & Microphone: 720p HD webcam and external microphone or headset with noise cancellation for clear communication



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Legal Studies, Finance, or related field

3–5 years of real estate experience in compliance, legal, or administrative roles

High attention to detail, accuracy, and a process-driven mindset

Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex topics clearly

Excellent time-management and organizational skills

Experience in real estate compliance and familiarity with industry documentation is a must

Strong sense of integrity and professionalism when handling confidential information



Benefits

Competitive Salary Range: PHP 25,000–35,000, commensurate with experience and qualifications

Paid Time Off, Emergency / Sick Leave

Health insurance coverage or reimbursement

Remote-first, growth-oriented company culture

Opportunities for advancement and skill development

Collaborative, people-focused team environment



Work Schedule

Work hours may follow Eastern Standard Time (EST) or Pacific Standard Time (PST), typically within a 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM schedule based on the client’s requirements or business needs.



We do NOT accept applications via this platform.

???? Please apply using our official form:


/forms/f701a6013de445de4bcdd8963ce9d83e?r=apse2

(Only takes a few minutes!)



We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Oncology Nurse (Remote)
description:
Job Title

Oncology Nurse (Remote)



Location

Philippines (Remote)



Work Type:

Part-time, then full time | Fully Remote





About Us

We are an integrative psycho-oncology care team supporting cancer patients through a combination of emotional, psychological, and holistic care approaches. Our work focuses on improving quality of life, resilience, and patient support alongside conventional treatment.





Role Overview

We are seeking a compassionate and experienced Oncology Nurse based in the Philippines to join our team on a part-time remote basis.



You will support patient care through regular check-ins, symptom monitoring, and coordination within a psycho-oncology framework.





Key Responsibilities



Conduct scheduled remote patient check-ins (video or phone)



Monitor patient symptoms, side effects, and overall well-being



Provide patient education and supportive care guidance



Provide supportive guidance and basic emotional support within scope of practice



Escalate medical concerns appropriately



Collaborate with the care team to support patient plans



Maintain accurate and confidential patient records



Requirements



Registered Nurse (RN), licensed in the Philippines



Experience in oncology nursing (hospital or outpatient setting)



Strong communication skills in English (clear and confident for international patients)



Comfortable with telehealth (Zoom/phone-based care)



Compassionate, patient-centered approach



Ability to work independently in a remote setting



Experience working with international (e.g. US-based) patients is a plus





Preferred



Experience in palliative care or psycho-oncology



Exposure to integrative or holistic care approaches







Compensation

?40,000 – ?70,000/month (part-time, approx. 20 - 30 hours/week)



Flexible hours based on scheduled patient check-ins



Working Arrangement



100% remote



Flexible part-time hours



Scheduled patient calls with additional support as needed





How to Apply

Please send your CV and a short introduction outlining your oncology experience and interest in integrative care.



Kindly include your expected salary in your application.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a brief 15-minute interview with a live scenario.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We’re a tabletop game company looking for a part-time Social Media Manager to help grow our brand through creator partnerships.



This role focuses on outreach to small creators on Instagram, TikTok,
, etc.—inviting them to receive a free game in exchange for posting a video. Our goal is to send 100+ games per month, and you’ll manage the process end-to-end: contacting creators, tracking videos, and organizing address details in a spreadsheet.



You’ll also engage with content (commenting, building relationships), and work with top creators to secure permission to repost their videos or acquire usage rights for use in our ads.

title: QuickBooks Expert / Case Manager
description:
PLEASE READ UNTIL THE END!!!



Are you highly organized and detail-oriented with experience in QuickBooks and customer account management? Do you enjoy solving problems, managing cases, and keeping financials in perfect order? If so, we want YOU to join our team!



- This is a full-time position, requiring availability from 9 am to 5 pm EST, Monday to Friday.

title: Senior Short-Form Video Editor — Remote
description:
About the Role



We're an international content agency managing creators across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. We're hiring ONE experienced editor who understands that the first 1.5 seconds d
 whether a Reel performs or dies.

Not an entry-level role. If your process is "add captions + trending sound + export" — please don't apply.



What You'll Do



- Edit raw footage for ~5 creators

- Deliver 15–25 short-form videos per day (most under 20 seconds)

- Cut for retention: strong hooks, tight pacing, zero dead frames

- Add captions, on-screen text, synced sounds, mini effects

- Hold consistent quality at high volume



A skilled editor handles one creator's daily output in 20–30 minutes.



Compensation (USD, paid via Wise / Payoneer)



???? Full-Time (preferred) — 40h/week, 6 days, exclusive



Junior (1–2y): $500–$650 · Mid (2–4y): $650–$900 · Senior (4+y): $900–$1,200



???? Part-Time — 3–4h/day, 7 days/week



Junior: $350–$450 · Mid: $450–$650 · Senior: $650–$850





Hard Requirements



- Min. 2 years professional short-form editing (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

- Public portfolio with live published videos that performed — no showreels

- Advanced skills in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut Pro, or After Effects

- Deep understanding of hooks, retention, viewer psychology

- Excellent written + spoken English

- Reliable, hits daily deadlines without being chased



Hardware (verified via screenshot)



16 GB RAM min · 8+ core CPU (Ryzen 5 5600 / i
/ Apple M1+) · Dedicated GPU (RTX 3050+ or Apple Silicon) · 500 GB+ SSD free · 50 Mbps? / 20 Mbps? · Must export 4K 60fps without crashes





How to Apply —
 Only



We accept applications ONLY via
.
s, comments, and 
 messages are ignored.




 on
 with all 8 items below. Missing items = auto-reject.



1. 3 short-form videos you edited, each with a link to the live public post (IG / TikTok / Shorts). No showreels.

2. 3–5 sentences: What makes the first 1.5 seconds of a short-form video d
 whether it performs or fails? Be specific. "Strong hook" = rejected.

 or speedtest.net)

title: virtual assistant
description:
Job Title: Operations & Outreach VA — Online Coaching Business (Airtable Experience Required)



About the Role

I am looking for a highly organised, proactive Virtual Assistant to join my online coaching business full time. I run multiple operations simultaneously — my own coaching program called Elite Setters, where I help people get started in appointment setting, and I also manage setter teams for other offers in the fitness and recovery space.

This is not a basic admin role. I need someone who can think, track, follow through, and take real ownership of their responsibilities without needing to be chased.

If you are experienced, reliable, and want to grow with a fast-moving online business — read on.



Hours

Full time — Monday to Friday

Spain time (CET/CEST) — you must be available and working during Spanish business hours

This will be approximately 3:00pm to 11:00pm Philippines time (please confirm you are comfortable with this before applying)



Pay

$3 to $5 per hour depending on experience

Paid weekly via Wise or similar



What You Will Be Doing

Instagram Outreach & Follow-Ups



Reaching out to leads who engage with content on Instagram on behalf of Nick (you will be messaging as Nick — full training and scripts provided)

Sending follow-up messages to leads who have not replied, following a set schedule and system

Keeping every conversation warm, human, and on brand — not robotic or copy-pasted

Knowing when to flag a lead to Nick as ready for a sales call



Tracking & Reporting



Tracking all outreach activity daily — who was messaged, what stage they are at, what the reply was

Tracking setter performance across the offers Nick manages — daily call numbers, show rates, booking rates, and any issues flagged

Updating Airtable dashboards daily so Nick has a clear picture of what is happening across all offers at any given time

Flagging underperforming setters or leads that need attention



Offer Management Support



Supporting the day-to-day running of the setter teams Nick manages across his fitness and recovery offers

Communicating with setters to chase daily updates and numbers

Keeping Nick informed with a clear daily summary so he does not have to chase information himself



General Operations



Organising and maintaining systems and SOPs as the business grows

Handling administrative tasks as they come up — scheduling, reminders, document organisation

Suggesting improvements to processes where you spot inefficiencies





You Must Have



Solid experience using Airtable — building bases, creating dashboards, and maintaining them daily (this is non-negotiable, please do not apply if you do not have this)

Experience working in a VA role for an online business, coaching business, or sales environment

Excellent written English — all communication is in English and must sound natural and professional

Strong attention to detail — you will be tracking numbers and managing conversations where small mistakes matter

A reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

The ability to work independently without being micromanaged

Availability during Spain timezone hours full time





You Will Stand Out If You Have



Experience in appointment setting, sales, or working with a high ticket coaching offer

Experience managing or supporting a remote team

Familiarity with Instagram outreach or DM-based lead generation

Experience building SOPs or process documentation





How to Apply

To make sure you have read this properly, start your application with the words "Elite Setters" at the top.

Then tell me:



Your experience with Airtable — specifically what you have built and how you used it

Your experience working with an online business or coaching brand

Confirm you are available and comfortable working Spain timezone hours full time

Your expected rate within the $3 to $5 per hour range



Applications that do not follow this format will not be considered.

title: [Urgent] E-commerce Virtual Assistant - New Shopify Brand (UK Market)
description:
Hi there,



I am an e-commerce entrepreneur from the Netherlands, and I am launching a new Shopify store in the United Kingdom next week. I am looking for a reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join my team.



Because I am in the launch phase, this role will start as a standby/part-time position. As the business scales, I am looking for someone to grow with me into a long-term, full-time partnership.



What I am looking for:



Integrity is my #1 Priority: I value honesty above everything else. I have a zero-tolerance policy for dishonesty. If you make a mistake, just tell me, and we will fix it together. 

But if there is any form of dishonesty, it will result in an immediate end to our collaboration. 

I am looking for a longterm partner whom I can trust 100%.



Excellent British English: You must be able to write in a professional, polite, and "proper" British tone.



Shopify Experience: Familiarity with the Shopify dashboard, DSers, or KongfooBuy is a big plus.



Detail-oriented: You understand the difference between "parcels" and "packages".



What you will be doing:

-Customer Support: Answering
s and managing social media comments.

-Order Fulfillment: Processing orders and communicating with our agent (KongfooBuy).

-Operations: Tracking shipments via Royal Mail and requesting quotations/QC photos.



Why work with me?

Flexibility: We start with a few hours a week, and as the orders increase, your hours will increase.

Growth: You will learn how to scale a brand from the ground up.



How to apply:



Please reply with a brief summary of your experience.

What is your hourly rate?

What is your favourite colour? (I ask this to ensure you have read the full post).



The Selection Process:

After reviewing applications, I will select the top 3 candidates for a short, paid test task. ($10 payment)

Based on the results, I will hire the best candidate to start immediately.



I look forward to meeting you!



Best regards,



Tamara Stegeman

Excellent interpersonal skills

title: Magazine Designer
description:
Hello all,

I'd like to make a hair salon/barber shop magazine.

There are a lot of different websites online to buy tool from and it's time consuming to look for the best deals.

My goal is to create a monthly magazine that highlights the best deals across a few dozen websites.

This isn't a commentary heavy magazine, we're not reviewing products either.

We'd pick a product like, "StyleCraft Rebel" and find the best deals for it.

Each issue will focused on a product niche. With the "StyleCraft Rebel" we'd be focusing on clippers, there are several brands of clippers and each brand has a few models.

We'll further break it down by brand, so for the StyleCraft brand we'll show the best deals for all their top clippers: Stylecraft Instinct, StyleCraft Rebel, StyleCraft Ergo...



We're making a price catalogue that gets it's prices from a few dozen websites.

If it's possible I'd like to post one of these catalogues every week, but it could be bi-weekly.



I have someone already that will gather all the data in a concise manner, so you won't be hunting for anything.

Your job will be taking all the price data and rendering it into a visually appealing catalogue.



We will start by making a style/format guide, then we'll do a few trial examples until we're happy with the design and layout.

This stage of the project just includes the design of the magazine, once we've designed the style of the magazine your job is done.



After this gig is complete you will have the opportunity to become the weekly editor, in which you will build each magazine issue according to our previously created style/design guide. You will be paid for each issue, but this is in the future.



I'm offering $150CAD for the creation of a design/style guide and several formatting examples to be made. 

Thanks,

. Your job is to review each ticket, calculate what each creator is owed (retainer + view bonuses + comment bounties), send them a payment breakdown message in 
, and log everything in our payment tracking sheet.



This role is mostly math + attention to detail. If you love making sure numbers are right and people are paid fairly and on time, this is for you.

Check the cut list — creators on it get half their retainer and a non-renewal message

Send a formatted payment breakdown message in the creator's

We are seeking a diligent, customer-focused individual to join our team as a Part-Time Virtual Assistant with Appointment Setting focus. This role requires availability every Saturday and a basic understanding of social media management. As the primary point of contact for our clients, you will play a key role in ensuring a seamless experience throughout the couch and carpet cleaning process.



Responsibilities:

Respond promptly to customer inquiries via phone,
, and text.

Schedule appointments for couch and carpet cleaning services, coordinating with clients and technicians to ensure timely arrivals.

Address customer concerns and complaints with empathy and professionalism, working to resolve issues to their satisfaction.

Collaborate closely with cleaning technicians to ensure all customer needs are met.

Assist with administrative tasks, including invoicing and billing.



Qualifications:



Strong communication skills, both verbal and written.

Excellent interpersonal skills with a focus on customer satisfaction.

Proficiency in basic computer applications and CRM systems.

Experience in customer service or related fields is preferred.

If you are passionate about delivering outstanding customer service, are available on Saturdays, we’d love to hear from you!



TO APPLY:



Please submit your resume and an introductory voice recording detailing your relevant experience and why you’d be a great fit for this role.



We look forward to welcoming you to our team!

title: Engineer
description:
Transportation Safety Engineer - Street Simplified

At Street Simplified, we use video analytics to help public sector agencies understand why crashes happen and give them the tools to proactively prevent them. We are looking to hire a Transportation Safety Engineer who is passionate about road safety and saving lives.



Working hours: Hybrid



Responsibilities and Duties:

Building detailed reports outlining risks and potential mitigations at high-crash locations

Research into new countermeasures, standards, and agency requirements

Review of Street Safety Analytics data, quality control, and analytics interpretation

Researching safety-related topics and writing articles or publications

Applying programming techniques to improve safety decision-making

Using transportation engineering concept formulation & preliminary design



Experience:

Bachelors of civil, or traffic engineering, or a related field (compensation will vary based on expertise, experience, and education)

Preferred experience in transportation engineering & design

Preferred experience in transportation safety

Preferred experience with programming, statistical analysis, and research



Qualifications:

Graduate degree in transportation, civil, traffic engineering, or related engineering or science field.



Here's how to apply!



If you are interested in joining our team, please use the link below to fill out the form.

------->>



Make sure to select "Transportation Safety Engineer / Civil Engineer" from the drop-down menu.



Ready to make an impact? Apply now and hit the road to success with Street Simplified

title: Etsy Part-Time Laser, Print Design & Production Assistant
description:
Position Type: Part-Time

Hours: 20 - 30 hours per week (with potential to grow)



About our Company:

Join a thriving Etsy shop specializing in custom laser-engraved products. We are passionate about delivering high-quality, personalized items to our customers worldwide, fostering creativity and excellence in every order. Our small, fully-remote team is dedicated to providing exceptional products and a delightful customer experience through our handmade creations.



 Application, Timeline & Instructions: (If you do not take the time to read and follow the instructions you will not be considered.)

- As part of our hiring process, we invite you to submit a Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why you would be an excellent fit for this role. Please include the following in your video. 

-  Etsy and E-commerce Experience: Share your experience with Etsy or other e-commerce platforms, highlighting any relevant skills or tasks you’ve managed. Why do you feel comfortable with the platform.

- Design Experience: Discuss your experience with design tools, such as Canva, Kittle, Adobe Products, Video Editing Software. This Job requires you to know a program called Lightburn investigate and provide a comprehensive answer to the next prompt. 

- Lightburn Research: Describe what you’ve researched about Lightburn, a laser engraving design program. In your own words, explain what it is, key functions you’ve identified, and how you would approach learning and using it effectively if you lack prior experience.

- Customer Service Experience: Discuss your experience managing customers in writing. Provide one example of a positive customer interaction, explaining what you did well and what you would improve. Then, share an example of a negative customer experience and what you would do differently to enhance the outcome. 

- Why should we hire you?



Key Duties and Responsibilities:

- Order Organization & Data Management. (Includes Spreadsheets Management)

- Laser Design & Production (Use of LightBurn)

- Design and edit engraving files using LightBurn for laser-cut or engraved products.

- Follow specific settings, and operational guidelines for laser production and print production workflows.

- Mock Up personalized and custom product designs using tools such as:

- Handle Kittl and Canva for graphic layouts and text-based personalization.

- LightBurn for engraved elements and vector designs.

- Imag-r for image enhancement or vectorization assistance. (Training provided)

- Adapt or revise existing templates for customer-specific requirements.

- Maintain style consistency across product lines and seasonal offerings.

- Exceptional communication in written English with customer, in spoken English with the company's team.



To consider: Lightburn Research (if no prior experience):

If unfamiliar with Lightburn, research the software thoroughly and provide a brief explanation of its purpose as a laser engraving design program and its key functions, such as:

- Importing and editing vector and raster files (e.g., SVG, DXF, PNG, JPG).

- Creating and managing layers to assign different engraving/cutting settings.

- Using shape creation tools (e.g., rectangles, ellipses, text) for custom designs.

- Previewing designs to ensure accuracy before engraving/cutting.

- Familiarity with Lightburn shortcuts will be helpful for efficient workflow, and candidates are encouraged to explore these as part of their learning process.



This remote position requires a commitment to continuous learning and refining your skills in both Lightburn and customer service. We are not looking for an employee with another job. We are looking for a long term relationship with a VA.



Who you Are:

- A tech-savvy individual who is self motivated and excels in design software and has abilities to learn.

- A self motivated individual who identifies tasks that need to be executed and has initiative to complete tasks.

- An adept relationship-builder who thrives in dynamic, customer-focused environments.

- A detail-oriented thinker, capable of following precise instructions and executing design tasks accurately.

- Committed to continuous learning, open to mastering Lightburn and evolving with our shop’s needs.

- Someone who can take feedback with responsibility and adapt easily to the requests. 

- Language Skills: Exceptional fluency in English, both written and spoken, with excellent communication skills to maintain a professional and friendly tone.

- Adaptability: Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adjust workflows based on order volume and customer needs. 



Benefits:

The flexibility of remote work.

An engaging, supportive team passionate about creativity and customer satisfaction.

A commitment to professional growth and continuous learning.

The possiblity of increased hours based on performance.



Join us and contribute to our mission of delivering unique, personalized laser-engraved products and exceptional customer experiences through our Etsy shop. Be part of a team dedicated to creativity, quality, and meaningful connections in the handmade marketplace!

title: Lead Client Success Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

The Lead Client Success Specialist ensures clients move smoothly through onboarding, stay on track with required tasks, understand each step of their bookkeeping/tax process, and feel guided throughout their engagement with the firm.

This role supplements the Project Manager by handling all client-facing communication, client education, gentle task chasing, deadline preparation, and coordination of calls and bookings with the Lead Financial Consultant. You are the “client guide” — keeping them accountable, informed, and supported so the CEO and PM can focus on strategic work and internal operations.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Onboarding

- Guide new clients through all onboarding steps using templates/scripts.

- Explain required documents and next steps clearly and simply.

- Track client readiness and update the Project Manager.

- Ensure all documents, signatures, and tasks are submitted on time.



Client Management & Task Follow-Up

- Proactively follow up on missing documents, overdue tasks, or unanswered messages.

- Maintain a clean client status log and escalate delays to the PM.

- Clarify expectations and deadlines to keep clients moving forward.



Communication

- Respond to client questions in Slack and TaxDome using approved materials.

- Provide updates on deadlines, deliverables, and next steps.

- Flag only complex issues to the PM or CEO.



Scheduling

- Schedule onboarding calls, data collection calls, and consultation calls.

- Send reminders and prepare clients for each call (what to bring, what to expect).

- Coordinate reschedules and maintain clean calendars.



Support the PM & CEO

- Notify PM when clients complete onboarding tasks.

- Update project stages, client portals, and Google Drive folders.

- Reduce interruptions by handling 80–90% of client-facing admin.



Success Metrics

- Onboarding completed within target timelines

- Reduction in CEO involvement in client follow-ups

- On-time client document submissions

- Fast response time to client inquiries

- Lower workflow delays caused by missing information



REQUIREMENTS

- Strong written and verbal English

- Excellent customer service and communication skills

- Project management & coordination experience

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Comfortable with Slack, Google Workspace, TaxDome (training provided)

- Prior VA experience in a service, agency, accounting, or legal firm is a plus



HOURS

- Full-time (35–40 hrs/week)

title: HOME CARE AGENCY ASSISTANT
description:
STRICT HIRING – * VERY FAST PACED WORK* Virtual Home Care Office Assistant (Philippines / LATAM Only) ACTUVE DURING FULL SHIFT ( making INBOUND and OUTBOUND calls) 





We are looking to hire a highly dependable, experienced Virtual Home Care Office Assistant for a long-term, full-time position. This role is NOT suitable for freelancers, job-hoppers, or applicants without verifiable home care agency experience.



-Applicants must be located in the Philippines or Latin America



WORK SCHEDULE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



-Monday – Friday | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

• Full-time

• Must be available during all working hours

• No second jobs during shift hours



NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS



* Fluent, professional English-speaking voice (clear, neutral accent required)

* Verifiable home care agency experience (scheduling, EVV, timesheets, visit verification)

* Proven ability to multitask in a fast-paced healthcare office

* Dependable, trustworthy, and detail-oriented

* Seeking long-term employment only (minimum 1 year commitment expected)

* Willing and able to complete background screening and clearance paperwork required for U.S. healthcare agencies

* Comfortable handling confidential U.S. healthcare information



- DO NOT APPLY IF YOU:



Do not have real home care experience



UNABLE to work fast pace or MULTI TASK



Cannot work U.S. CST hours consistently



Are currently working multiple jobs during shift hours



Are seeking short-term, freelance, or project-based work



REQUIRED EQUIPMENT (MUST ALREADY HAVE)



High-speed, stable internet (backup connection preferred)



Noise-canceling headset (required)



VPN (required)



Quiet, dedicated workspace (no background noise)



Ability to join video calls with camera ON



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Answer and place professional calls to clients and caregivers



Confirm visits and follow up on missed or incomplete visits



Support timesheet completion, task verification, and documentation



Manage
s, scheduling, and data entry accurately



Follow U.S. home care compliance, privacy, and agency procedures



COMPENSATION



-Good / Competitive Pay

• Based on experience, skills, and reliability

• Raises and long-term incentives available for top performers



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (STRICTLY ENFORCED)



To be considered, you MUST submit all of the following:



Resume with home care experience clearly listed



Short voice or video introduction (English speaking sample required)



Confirmation of equipment (internet speed, headset, VPN)



Written confirmation that you are willing to complete background and clearance screening



Answer this question at the top of your application:

“What home care systems have you worked with (e.g., Generations, EVV, scheduling software)?”



-Applications missing any requirement will NOT be reviewed.



WHY JOIN US



Long-term, stable employment



Clear expectations and structure



Professional U.S.-based healthcare agency



Opportunity to grow with the company

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
About the role:

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Executive Assistant to support our CEO on a full-time basis. This is a remote, contractor role requiring someone who can manage a fast-paced environment, keep the CEO focused on high-level priorities, and handle a wide variety of administrative and operational tasks independently. You will be a trusted right hand — anticipating needs, managing communications, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



Key responsibilities:

- Manage the CEO's calendar, scheduling, and daily priorities

- Handle
 correspondence, follow-ups, and inbox management

- Coordinate meetings, prepare agendas, and take notes

- Draft communications, documents, and presentations on behalf of the CEO

- Track action items, deadlines, and project progress

- Conduct research and compile reports as needed

- Liaise with clients, tea
mbers, and external partners professionally

- Handle ad hoc tasks and special projects as assigned



Requirements

- Proven experience as an executive assistant, virtual assistant, or in a similar administrative role

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

- Strong organizational and time management skills with keen attention to detail

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

- Proficiency with tools such as Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Zoom, Slack, or similar

- Available Monday–Friday, 8 AM to 4 PM Eastern Standard Time

- Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a quiet working environment

Nice to have:

- Familiarity with trading terminology, market schedules, or financial content

- Experience with CRM tools or
 marketing platforms (e.g., 
, Kajabi, ConvertKit, ClickFunnels)

title: Full-Time Landing Page Developer
description:
About Us

MHI Media is a UK-based e-commerce performance marketing agency that has scaled 50+ DTC brands to 7 and 8 figures across Meta, TikTok, and Google. We need high-converting landing pages to match our high-performing ads.



The Role

Build fast, mobile-first, conversion-optimised landing pages for DTC clients in fashion, wellness, beauty, food & beverage, and lifestyle.



You'll:

- Build custom landing and product pages on Shopify using page builders (GemPages, PageFly, Replo, Zipify, or Shogun)

- Translate creative briefs into advertorial, listicle, comparison, and product-focused pages

- Implement CRO elements (CTAs, urgency, social proof, sticky ATC) and tracking (Meta Pixel, GA, UTMs)

- Run A/B tests and iterate based on performance data

- Collaborate with media buyers and creative strategists across multiple client projects



Requirements

- 2+ years building landing pages for DTC/e-commerce brands

- Strong HTML, CSS, JavaScript

- Hands-on Shopify experience (Liquid + page builders)

- [REQUIRED] Experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, v0) to build and iterate

- Solid CRO fundamentals and mobile-first approach

- Familiar with page speed optimisation and conversion tracking

- [REQUIRED] Strong written English; available during UK business hours



What We Offer

- Full-time remote role, competitive salary, exciting DTC brands, collaborative team, and clear path to senior as we scale.



How to Apply

 
 with subject line: OLJ - Your Name - LP Developer



Include only:

1. Name

2.

3. Resume (link)

4. Portfolio (link)



Applications not following this format will not be considered.

title: Construction Project Manager / Hiring Manager / Operations Manager (Remote – Full Time | US Company)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate investment and construction company completing 70+ single-family home renovations per year. Our projects range from full gut rehabs to light renovations, landscaping, and punch-out work.

We operate at high volume, move quickly, and expect strong execution. Our goal is to build a world-class construction operation powered by elite remote talent.





The Role

We are hiring a Construction Project Manager / Hiring Manager / Operations Manager to take ownership of our contractor network and project execution.

This is not a beginner role. You will be responsible for building and managing an entire construction ecosystem remotely.



You will:

• Source, vet, and hire contractors across multiple trades

• Manage multiple renovation projects simultaneously

• Ensure jobs are completed on time, on budget, and at high quality

• Coordinate materials, timelines, and communication across all parties



Key Responsibilities

 Contractor Sourcing & Hiring

• Find contractors 
 groups, Craigslist, Google, referrals, etc.)

• Vet contractors (pricing, experience, reliability, capacity)

• Build long-term relationships with top performers

• Maintain a strong bench of crews across all trades

 

Project Management

• Oversee full house renovations from start to finish

• Manage:

o Drywall

o Painting

o Flooring

o Landscaping

o Cleanouts / junk removal

o Punch-out lists

• Track timelines and hold contractors accountable

• Ensure projects stay on schedule and within budget



Materials & Logistics

• Order materials from Home Depot and other vendors

• Coordinate deliveries to job sites

• Ensure contractors have what they need to perform efficiently

• Optimize material costs and sourcing

 

Operations & Systems

• Build and improve systems for:

o Job tracking

o Contractor performance

o Cost control

• Manage multiple projects at scale (10+ active jobs at once)

• Communicate daily updates to leadership



Who We’re Looking For (Avatar)

You are:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong communicator (English fluency required)

• Experienced in construction project management

• Comfortable managing multiple moving parts at once

• A problem solver who takes ownership and gets things done

• Results-driven (you care about speed, cost, and quality)



Bonus if you:

• Have worked with U.S. construction or real estate investors

• Have experience managing remote construction teams

• Understand renovation scopes and pricing

• Have used tools like CRMs, project management software, or spreadsheets



Key Skills Required

• Contractor hiring & negotiation

• Project scheduling & coordination

• Budget management

• Material ordering & vendor coordination

• Communication & leadership

• Systems thinking (scaling operations)



Compensation & Growth

• Competitive base salary

• Performance bonuses tied to:

o Project completion speed

o Cost savings

o Contractor performance

• Long-term growth opportunity into a senior operations leadership role



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, you MUST include:

1. Video Introduction (2–3 minutes):

o Your experience with construction/project management

o Any experience hiring or managing contractors

o Why you are a great fit for this role

2. Describe a project you managed:

o Scope of work

o Budget

o Timeline

o Your role in execution

3. Answer this question:

o How would you find and hire 5 reliable contractors in a new city within 7 days?



Why Join Us

• Work with a high-volume, fast-scaling U.S. company

• Be part of building a world-class construction operation

• Stable, long-term opportunity with room to grow

• Performance-based upside

title: Video Editor
description:
Looking for full time video editor for AI videos to market products.



You will be editing and making AI videos using AI tools like Veo3, Gemini, Higgsfield, Heygen, and ElevenLabs. You will be generating video clips / AI characters talking and editing them with Capcut.



You will be trained extensively on how to do it, previous experience using CapCut is required but the other tools you don't need any experience in. It'll be mostly just providing scripts to an AI tool and then playing with the prompts to get a good outcome of the video. It's quite easy once you get the hang of it, which we'll train you to do!



Starting pay is $3.3 US dollars per video - This is just to start, for people who make good, high quality videos we will increase the pay per video if we see that you're trying your best.



Requirements:



- Attention to detail

- STRONG English

- Strong internet connection

- Previous experience with Capcut

- Good working with a team

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

- Availability for 6-8h a day (never more, sometimes less)

- Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever needed as long as mostly consistent)

- Can take payments through Wise



Please send your portfolio and this mandatory recreate assignment (without submitting this your application will NOT be viewed):

title: Growth Systems Engineer
description:
We are hiring a high-performing Growth Systems Engineer (Technical GTM Builder) at AI Acquisition. This is a specialized technical role responsible for architecting the entire lead-to-revenue infrastructure for our clients—entrepreneurs and agencies scaling AI-powered businesses.



This role is ideal for technical architects who don't just "code," but who understand how to build and connect complex systems (GHL, Twilio, Ads, Dashboards) to automate lead flow and maximize conversion. You must understand both technical execution and revenue logic to ensure the systems you build actually drive growth.



Work Model: Remote | Full-Time (8 hours/day minimum)



What You’ll Own

- Build & Connect Growth Stacks: Architect end-to-end systems including GoHighLevel (GHL), Twilio, and CRM integrations.

- Automate Lead Flow: Design and execute technical workflows that convert outbound traffic into revenue opportunities.+1

- System Optimization: Debug and optimize the entire technical system to ensure zero leakage in the lead-to-revenue funnel.

- Technical Implementation: Deliver high-impact, ROI-focused system demonstrations to founders.+1

- CRM & Data Management: Ensure data flows correctly between marketing tools and sales dashboards for accurate reporting.

- Maintain System Health: Provide structured end-of-day reporting on system performance and automation stability.

- Partner with Client Success: Work alongside consultants to translate business ideas into functional, AI-powered technical realities.



Requirements:

- 3–5+ years of proven experience building GTM (Go-To-Market) systems or RevOps.

- Expert-level mastery of GoHighLevel (GHL) and Make/Zapier (Mandatory).

- Proven experience connecting technical tools (Twilio, Apollo, Ads) to drive business outcomes.

- Experience working with mid-to-high-ticket service businesses.

- Experience in a fast-paced, aggressively growing startup environment.



Skills

- Fluent English (A Must Have).

- Technical Problem-Solver: Able to uncover system "red flags" and debug complex integration errors independently.

- Commercially Strong: Understands business models, ROI, and how technical builds impact a founder’s bottom line.

- Systems Thinking: Able to manage multiple client contexts and niches simultaneously without losing focus.

- Strong Documentation: Clear written communication for handing off technical builds to internal teams.

Mindset

- Extreme Ownership: Takes full responsibility for the stability and success of the build.

- Efficiency-Driven: Focused on building scalable systems that work without constant manual intervention.

- High Technical Resilience: Thrives under the pressure of a scaling global business.

- Continuous Learner: Stays at the forefront of AI automations and prompt engineering.



Success Metrics

- 100% Build Accuracy: Systems are delivered to clients without technical errors or broken links.

- 95%+ Automation Uptime: Lead flows and conversion triggers run without interruption.

- Lead-to-Revenue Efficiency: Significant reduction in manual tasks for clients via your automations.

- Fast Implementation Cycles: Meeting delivery deadlines for growth system deployments.

- System Scalability: Infrastructure remains stable as lead volume increases.



Why This Role Stands Out

- Competitive full-time compensation

- Fully remote flexibility

- Direct impact on revenue growth

- Work alongside experienced commercial leaders

- Operate in a high-performance sales culture

- Significant upside for top performers

- Long-term growth within a scaling global business



If you’re organized, technically minded, and ready to help us shape the future of AI-driven marketing, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now by submitting your CV and a short note about why you’re a great technical fit. We’re excited to welcome the right person to our team!

title: Assistant Property Manager (Direct Hire)
description:

title: AI Video Editor
description:
We are a marketing agency based in Canada and are looking for an AI video editor.



We're looking for a talented AI Video Editor with strong experience in creating realistic AI avatars and producing high-quality avatar-based videos. You'll build custom digital avatars (talking heads / synthetic humans), animate them with natural expressions/lip-sync, integrate voiceovers (text-to-speech or cloned voices), and edit/polish the final videos for marketing, explainer content, social media, training videos, or YouTube/LinkedIn content.

This is a freelance / contract role with potential for ongoing long-term collaboration (weekly/monthly projects). Remote – work anywhere.



Key responsibilities:

• Design and generate custom AI avatars from photos, videos, or full-body references (realistic or stylized)

• Use AI video generation tools to create lip-synced, expressive talking avatar videos from scripts

• Handle full video production workflow: script refinement ? avatar creation ? voice synthesis/integration ? animation & motion ? editing & post-production

• Edit and enhance avatar videos (color grading, transitions, captions/subtitles, background removal/compositing, motion graphics, pacing)

• Ensure avatars look natural: proper eye contact, realistic gestures/facial expressions, consistent lighting & branding

• Repurpose content (e.g., turn long-form into shorts/reels, multilingual versions)

• Optimize videos for platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, ads)

• Collaborate on prompt engineering for best AI outputs and iterate based on feedback

• Deliver clean project files and final exports (MP4, various resolutions/aspect ratios)



Required Skills & Experience

• Proven portfolio showing realistic AI avatar videos (talking heads, digital presenters, synthetic influencers) – please share links (YouTube, Vimeo, portfolio site)

• Strong hands-on experience with leading AI avatar & video tools (most or many of these):

 - HeyGen, Synthesia, D-ID, Colossyan, 
 (avatar platforms)

 - Runway ML, Pika Labs, Luma Dream Machine, Kling AI, Veo (Google), Sora (if accessible)

 - Descript (Overdub + Studio Avatars), ElevenLabs or similar for voice cloning

 - Traditional editing: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, Final Cut Pro

• Experience with voice synthesis and lip-sync tools (ElevenLabs, PlayHT, Respeecher, etc.)

• Understanding of prompt engineering for text-to-video and image-to-video AI models

• Solid video editing fundamentals: timing, pacing, storytelling, color correction, audio mixing



Qualifications

• 1-2 years working with generative AI video tools

• Portfolio demonstrating before/after or process work is highly valued

• Excellent attention to detail – avatars must feel lifelike

• Strong communication skills, English required

• Ability to meet deadlines and handle multiple iterations

 

How to Apply

Reply with:

1. Your portfolio link(s) showing AI avatar / talking head work

2. Which AI avatar & video tools you're most experienced with

3. Your rate (hourly or per video/project – e.g., per 60-second avatar video)

4. Availability (hours per week or notice period)



We're reviewing applications immediately – looking forward to seeing your avatar magic!

title: Virtual Assistant for Etsy Order Processing and Customer Communication
description:
About Our Company:

Join a thriving Etsy shop specializing in custom laser-engraved products. We are passionate about delivering high-quality, personalized items to our customers worldwide, fostering creativity and excellence in every order. Our small, fully-remote team is dedicated to providing exceptional products and a delightful customer experience through our handmade creations.



? Position Overview:

As a Virtual Assistant for Etsy Order Design and Customer Service, you will play a pivotal role in managing our Etsy shop’s order processing and customer interactions. Your primary responsibilities will include designing order files in Lightburn, a laser engraving design program, and communicating with customers in a professional, kind, and brand-aligned voice. This role is essential in ensuring our orders are accurately prepared for laser cutting/engraving and that our customers feel valued through personalized, high-quality service. We are looking to close the hiring process at the end of this week, or early next week. So if you are interested please follow the instructions as given or you will not be considered. Be responsive in your messages so we continue with your application.



? Application, Timline & Instructions:

? As part of our hiring process, we invite you to submit a ?Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why you would be an excellent fit for this role. Please include the following in your video. Include ? why you feel confident with Etsy, and whatever knowledge you research about Lightburn.

? Etsy and E-commerce Experience: Share your experience with Etsy or other e-commerce platforms, highlighting any relevant skills or tasks you’ve managed.

? Customer Service Experience: Discuss your experience managing customers in writing. Provide one example of a positive customer interaction, explaining what you did well and what you would improve. Then, share an example of a negative customer experience and what you would do differently to enhance the outcome.

? Lightburn Research: Describe what you’ve researched about Lightburn, a laser engraving design program. In your own words, explain what it is, key functions you’ve identified, and how you would approach learning and using it effectively if you lack prior experience.



If you lack Lightburn experience, include a short paragraph explaining what Lightburn is and three key functions you’ve identified through research.



? Key Duties & Responsibilities:

Order Processing and Design:

? Interpret Etsy orders from PDFs or other provided formats and create designs using Lightburn’s design tools, a laser engraving program, according to detailed instructions.

? Ensure all designs are accurate and meet specifications for laser cutting/engraving by our team.

? Work independently in Lightburn’s design interface, which does not require a connected laser, to prepare files for production.

? Customer Service and Communication:

? Respond to Etsy customer messages promptly, maintaining a professional, dedicated, and kind tone that aligns with our brand’s warm and creative voice.

? Send daily personalized order confirmation messages to customers, enhancing their experience with tailored communication.

? Document and summarize customer issues, such as refund requests or complaints, in a clear and concise report for the team.

?Compile a daily corrections list or summary of issues (e.g., customer refund requests, design errors, or special cases) and integrate relevant corrections into Lightburn designs.



? Qualifications:

? Experience: Prior experience with Etsy (preferred) or similar e-commerce platforms. Experience in graphic design, laser engraving software, or customer service is a plus.

? Technical Proficiency: Strong knowledge of Lightburn’s design interface or a willingness to research and learn it quickly, including its key functions. Familiarity with Etsy’s platform and messaging system.

? Language Skills: Fluent in English, both written and spoken, with excellent communication skills to maintain a professional and friendly tone.

? Adaptability: Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adjust workflows based on order volume and customer needs.

Collaboration: Experience or comfort working in a remote team, with excellent interpersonal skills and a collaborative spirit.



? Note: Lightburn Research (if no prior experience):

If unfamiliar with Lightburn, research the software thoroughly and provide a brief explanation of its purpose as a laser engraving design program and its key functions, such as:

? Importing and editing vector and raster files (e.g., SVG, DXF, PNG, JPG).

? Creating and managing layers to assign different engraving/cutting settings.

? Using shape creation tools (e.g., rectangles, ellipses, text) for custom designs.

? Previewing designs to ensure accuracy before engraving/cutting.

? Familiarity with Lightburn shortcuts will be helpful for efficient workflow, and candidates are encouraged to explore these as part of their learning process.



? This remote position requires a commitment to continuous learning and refining your skills in both Lightburn and customer service. We are not looking for an employee with another job. We are looking for a long term relationship with a VA.



? Who You Are:

? A tech-savvy communicator with a knack for creating compelling and professional customer interactions.

? An adept relationship-builder who thrives in dynamic, customer-focused environments.

? A detail-oriented thinker, capable of following precise instructions and executing design tasks accurately.

? Committed to continuous learning, open to mastering Lightburn and evolving with our shop’s needs



? Benefits:

The flexibility of remote work.

An engaging, supportive team passionate about creativity and customer satisfaction.

A commitment to professional growth and continuous learning.

The possiblity of increased hours based on performance. 



Join us and contribute to our mission of delivering unique, personalized laser-engraved products and exceptional customer experiences through our Etsy shop. Be part of a team dedicated to creativity, quality, and meaningful connections in the handmade marketplace!

title: higgsfield ads creator

At its core, it uses generative AI to turn simple inputs—like a product description, brand tone, or campaign goal—into fully formed ad creatives. That can include:

Ad copy (headlines, captions, CTAs)

Visual concepts or generated images

Short-form video ads or storyboards

Multi-platform variations (for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, etc.)

What makes it stand out is its focus on performance-driven creativity. Instead of just producing generic content, it aims to generate ads optimized for engagement and conversion by learning from successful ad patterns and trends.

In practical terms, you’d use it like this:

Input your product or campaign idea

Choose a style, audience, or platform

Let the AI generate multiple ad variations

Edit or export the best-performing options

It’s especially useful for:

Startups without a full creative team

E-commerce brands running lots of ad tests

Agencies needing fast turnaround on campaigns

 correspondence, and document organization.

s or WhatsApp communication (provide examples).
