title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Sales Development Representative

Lead Conversion, Appointment Setting, Pipeline & Sales Support



Type

Part-time, remote

Hours

Approximately 20 hours per week

Rate

$6 per hour (fixed, not negotiable)

Hours requirement

UK business hours: 9am to 5pm GMT/BST

Contract

3-month paid trial, then ongoing

Start

As soon as possible

Reference

STAY-SV: must be included in your application



ABOUT STAYFUL

Stayful is a UK property management company managing around 60 short-term rental properties on Airbnb, 
, and direct channels on behalf of UK landlords. We are growing fast and receiving approximately 100 qualified sales enquiries per month.



We are hiring one sales tea
mber to own three connected parts of our growth: converting warm leads through live web meetings, keeping the broader sales pipeline moving through follow-up and appointment setting, and supporting the sales and marketing activities that keep our pipeline full.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS

It is a commercial, client-facing position with three core functions that draw on the same underlying skills: sales confidence, pipeline discipline, and the ability to operate independently.



1. Web Meeting Conversion

You will attend and lead scheduled web meetings on camera with UK property landlords. These landlords have already expressed interest and booked a meeting. Your job is to present Stayful's income projections, handle objections live, and either close the lead or move them into a structured follow-up sequence.



Attend all scheduled web meetings on camera, representing Stayful professionally

Deliver property-specific income projection presentations using the Stayful Airbnb Profitability Action Plan

Handle landlord objections live using a structured framework (training provided)

Close leads with time-bounded discount offers where appropriate

Execute the post-meeting follow-up sequence: same-day
, WhatsApp check-in, phone call, objection-specific follow-up, final attempt

Pursue every lead to a conclusion: converted, nurturing, or disqualified



2. Appointment Setting & Pipeline Management

You will keep the broader sales pipeline moving: following up on warm inbound enquiries, scheduling calls for Zac (Director), and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



Follow up on all warm inbound enquiries promptly: speed of response is critical

Schedule and coordinate sales calls for Zac, managing Calendly links and the sales calendar

Send confirmation and reminder messages to prospects before calls

Conduct outreach via phone,
, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp to cold and warm prospect lists

Maintain 
 CRM: all lead statuses, notes, and next actions kept current

Cover for initial enquiry handling when Zac is unavailable



3. Sales Administration, Marketing & Pipeline Support

This function supports Trish (Direct Bookings Specialist) and keeps the wider sales operation running. It covers the outreach, marketing, and administrative activities that ensure a steady flow of new prospects into the pipeline.



Outreach & Lead Generation

Conduct cold outreach via phone using provided databases of property owners, operators, and corporate contacts

Carry out messaging outreach through Stayful's social media pages and direct messaging on 
 and

Act as the primary point of contact for operator partnership leads and contractor referrals

Support database growth by identifying and logging new prospects



Social Media & Marketing

Manage weekly social media posting and engagement across Stayful's channels

Maintain a consistent marketing cadence to keep Stayful visible and support the pipeline

Export and import previous guest data from Uplisting into GoHighLevel to support direct booking campaigns



Sales Administration

Handle administrative tasks for Stayful and Stayful Bookings Ltd as they relate to the sales function

Assist with invoicing, monitoring, and payment tracking for closed direct bookings

Prepare briefing notes for Trish and Zac ahead of scheduled sales calls

Keep CRM records, contact databases, and sales documentation organised and current



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

The ideal hire has a BPO sales or account management background in the UK or Australian market, or comes from real estate, financial services, or insurance. They are confident on camera, disciplined with follow-up, and do not need to be managed.



Essential

Strong spoken and written English: you will be speaking live with UK property owners and calling cold prospects

Available UK business hours (9am to 5pm GMT/BST): this is a firm requirement

Experience in a client-facing sales or account management role: appointment setting, telesales, BPO, or similar

Comfortable on camera for 45 to 60 minute meetings while presenting and screen sharing

Real objection handling ability: natural, confident responses rather than script reading

Disciplined pipeline management: CRM updated same day as every touchpoint, without being asked

Proactive and self-managed: no one will chase you to follow up leads or complete outreach

Comfortable making cold calls and handling initial pushback



Desirable

BPO or call centre background serving the UK or Australian market

Experience in property, real estate, financial services, insurance, or mortgage sales

Familiarity with 
, Calendly, GoHighLevel, or Uplisting

Experience managing social media accounts for a business

Experience progressing from appointment setting into a closing or account management role



THIS ROLE IS NOT RIGHT FOR YOU IF

You have only worked US market hours and cannot commit to UK business hours

You have no client-facing or live sales experience

You rely entirely on scripts and struggle when conversations go off track

You need constant direction and check-ins to manage your workload

You are looking for a background admin role: this is a front-facing commercial position



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Every warm lead receives a follow-up within the same day it comes in

Web meetings are attended on time, delivered professionally, and followed up without prompting


 is always current: Trish, Zac, and Martyn can see the full pipeline at any 
nt

Leads are moved to a clear outcome: converted, nurturing, or disqualified. No ghost leads.

Sales calls are booked efficiently with briefing notes prepared in advance

Social media channels are active and consistent, with posts going out on schedule

Cold outreach is happening daily, with a steady flow of new prospects entering the pipeline

Over time, conversion rate from web meeting to signed client improves measurably



DEVELOPMENT PATH

This role has clear progression. Training will be delivered by Trish and Zac and will be progressive:



Months 1 to 2: shadowing web meetings, handling follow-up and CRM, appointment setting, cold outreach, and social media

Month 3: leading web meetings independently with senior support available; training on acknowledgement
s, property sourcing, and messaging approach

Month 4 onwards: full ownership of the conversion pipeline, appointment function, and lead generation; growing confidence discussing Stayful's pricing strategy with prospects



The rate stated is the starting point and is reviewed at the end of the trial period.



HOW TO APPLY

Applications are only accepted through our formal application form. Do not send a message through the platform you found this advert on. Applications submitted this way will not be considered.



You must include the job reference STAY-SV in your application. Applications without this reference will not be reviewed.



Apply here: 



In your application, tell us specifically about your UK or Australian market sales experience, how you handle objections, and why you are a strong fit for this role. Generic applications will not be considered.

title: Insurance Broker Assistant - Australia
description:
Maverick Insurance Brokers



About Maverick



Maverick is a new-age commercial insurance brokerage built for business owners who expect more than just a policy.



We don’t do passive, once-a-year broking.

We proactively manage risk, move fast, and make sure our clients are properly covered as their businesses evolve.



We’re building a high-performance brokerage from day one with a strong pipeline, sharp systems, and a focus on growth.



The Role



We’re hiring an Offshore Insurance Account Manager based in the Philippines to operate as a core part of our broking team.



This is not a support role.



You’ll be expected to think, act, and operate like an Australian-based broker — managing policies, preparing submissions, reviewing coverage, and driving outcomes for clients.



The only difference: you’ll spend less time on the phone, and more time executing at speed and precision.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing a portfolio of commercial insurance clients (behind the scenes)

Preparing high-quality market submissions for insurers

Reviewing policies, endorsements, and wordings for accuracy and coverage gaps

Building renewal strategies and identifying opportunities to improve cover

Comparing quotes and preparing recommendations for clients

Managing policy changes, renewals, and documentation end-to-end

Working closely with onshore brokers to move deals forward quickly

Following up insurers and keeping 
ntum across all placements

Maintaining clean, structured data in CRM (HubSpot)

Identifying risks, issues, or gaps before they become problems

What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly competent technically - you understand commercial insurance inside out

You are very familiar with insurance platforms like Sunrise, Ebix.

Fast and proactive - you don’t wait to be told what to do

Detail-obsessed - you catch what others miss

Commercially minded - you understand client outcomes, not just policies

Structured thinker - you can manage multiple clients, policies, and deadlines without dropping the ball

You take responsibility and get things done



Experience Required

3+ years in commercial insurance (brokerage, account management or underwriting)

Strong knowledge across multiple lines (Property, Liability, Financial Lines, Motor, etc.)

Experience preparing submissions and managing renewals

Comfortable reviewing policy wordings and identifying gaps

Experience working with Australian brokers or insurers



How This Role is Different



Most offshore roles are admin-heavy.



This is not.



You will:



Be treated like a core broker

Be trusted with real responsibility

Work directly with founders and senior brokers

Be expected to move fast and think commercially

What Success Looks Like

Submissions go to market faster and at higher quality

Renewals are proactive, not reactive

Clients are better covered without needing to chase

Onshore brokers can focus on winning and relationships because you’ve handled the engine room



Why Join Maverick

Be part of a high-growth brokerage from the ground up

Work with a team that values speed, quality, and ownership

Clear progression as the business scales

Competitive offshore salary + performance upside

title: Construction Administrative Assistant
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Construction Administrative Assistant to support new store openings and construction projects from start to finish.







In this role, you’ll be the backbone of the construction team — coordinating permits, managing utilities, tracking timelines, and keeping projects moving forward. If you enjoy working behind the scenes to make complex projects run smoothly, this role is for you.







What You’ll Do



Construction Coordination



Track and follow up on permits (building, electrical, plumbing, fire, health)

Coordinate with contractors, architects, and vendors to keep projects on schedule

Maintain and organize project documents (contracts, invoices, change orders, etc.)

Process invoices and monitor project costs vs. budget

Update project timelines using tools like Smartsheet or similar





New Location Setup & Utilities



Set up utilities (electric, gas, water, internet) for new locations

Coordinate inspections, meter installations, and service activations

Manage business licenses, permits, and compliance requirements

Collect and track insurance certificates from vendors

Coordinate signage permits and installation





Pre-Opening Support



Manage pre-opening checklists and timelines

Ensure all requirements are completed before store launch

Coordinate with vendors for supplies, uniforms, and opening needs





Administrative Support



Manage calendars, schedules, and meetings

Prepare reports and project updates

Organize files and maintain accurate records

Communicate with vendors, city offices, and internal teams

Assist with general administrative tasks as needed





What We’re Looking For



2–4 years of experience in admin, construction coordination, or project support

Strong organizational and multitasking skills

Excellent written and verbal communication

Experience with permits, utilities, or construction processes is a strong plus

Proficient in Microsoft Office (especially Excel) or Google Workspace

Experience with Smartsheet, Procore, or similar tools is a plus

Able to work independently and manage multiple projects at once





Nice to Have



Experience supporting restaurant, retail, or construction projects

Familiarity with U.S. permitting or utility processes

Background in project management or operations

title: Social Media Manager (Content Strategist / Creator) – Not Your Typical SMM Role
description:
This is NOT a basic social media manager position.



If your skill set is just posting graphics, writing captions, and scheduling content — this is not for you.



We are looking for someone who understands how to create content that actually wins attention, builds a brand, and drives real engagement.



This role is much closer to a content creator / strategist than a traditional SMM.





???? The Role



Our entire marketing strategy is built around organic, high-performing content.



We are not trying to look like a typical apparel or branding company.

No generic posts. No “safe” content.



Everything we put out should feel:



Intentional

Entertaining

Native to the platform

Impossible to ignore



You should know how to take a simple idea and turn it into scroll-stopping content.





???? What You’ll Be Responsible For

Creating and executing short-form video content (TikTok / Reels)

Developing content series, not just one-off posts

Writing strong hooks (first 1–3 seconds) that grab attention

Bringing personality, humor, and storytelling into content

Staying on top of trends, formats, and internet culture

Testing content fast and iterating based on performance

Helping shape the voice and identity of the brand





???? What We’re Looking For

You must have:



Strong portfolio of short-form video content

Content that feels native, not corporate or overly polished

Clear understanding of what makes people stop scrolling

Proven performance (views, engagement, growth, etc.)

Strong instincts for timing, pacing, and storytelling



If your portfolio is mostly:



Canva graphics

Generic captions

No performance metrics

???? This is not a fit.







???? Ideal Background

We are specifically looking for candidates who have worked in:



Apparel / streetwear / lifestyle brands

E-commerce (especially DTC brands)

TikTok-first or Instagram-first brands

Social-first agencies (NOT corporate clients)

Personal brands or creators with strong followings





Big plus if you’ve worked with:



Younger audiences (18–35)

Edgy, humorous, personality-driven brands

Fast-paced content environments





???? Not a Fit If Your Background Is In:

Real estate marketing

Corporate B2B content

Medical, legal, or overly professional industries

Anything slow, safe, or overly polished

These backgrounds typically produce content that does not perform in today’s environment.







???? What Matters Most

We care about taste.

Your work should feel:



Current

Sharp

Differentiated

Intentional



You should already understand how modern content works 







???? How to Apply



To be considered, send:



Links to your best short-form video work (TikTok / Reels)

Include performance metrics (views, engagement, growth)

Briefly explain:

Why your content works

Your thought process behind 1–2 pieces



Applications without portfolio + metrics will not be reviewed.







? Final Note

We would rather pass on candidates than lower the standard.

If you know how to create content that actually gets attention — we want to see it.

title: Senior Sales Consultant – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 



Property Investment : 



- Work closely with Management team to develop business opportunities for new property investment and development projects on a project basis. 



- Unlock Potential: Identify underutilized properties and devise creative strategies to maximize their value and utility



Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer
description:
Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer







Remote-Based  |  Occasional Travel Required  |  Part-Time / Contract





About Our Company :



We are the leading Coding and Robotics Education Academy in Singapore. Our passion and mission is in teaching the children of today, the skills of tomorrow, and have fun learning it !



About the Role : 



We are seeking a passionate and experienced Coding & Robotics Education Trainer to support our growing network of licensees. The successful candidate will be responsible for training our licensee partners who have adopted our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are well-equipped to deliver high-quality STEM education programs.



This role is primarily remote-based, with occasional travel required for training sessions, workshops, or partner support.



You will empower our licensees with the knowledge, skills, and confidence to deliver our coding and robotics curriculum effectively to children aged 5 to 14 years old. You will also play a key role in keeping our curriculum fresh, relevant, and engaging by updating existing materials and developing new content as our programmes evolve.



Key Responsibilities :



•	Train and onboard new licensees on our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are equipped to deliver high-quality lessons.

•	Conduct training workshops and sessions for licensee educators, both virtually and in-person as required.

•	Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and support to licensees post-training.

•	Evaluate licensee competency and readiness to deliver the curriculum independently.

•	Review, update, and improve existing curriculum materials to ensure they remain current and effective.

•	Develop new curriculum modules and lesson plans aligned with industry trends and educational best practices.

•	Collaborate with the curriculum and product teams to align training delivery with programme goals.

•	Gather feedback from licensees and learners to continuously improve training programmes.

•	Maintain comprehensive training documentation, guides, and resources.

•	Travel occasionally to licensee locations for in-person training, support, and quality assurance.



Who We Are Looking For :



We are seeking someone who combines a love for education technology with real-world teaching experience. The ideal candidate:

•	Has proven experience training adults in a professional or educational setting.

•	Has hands-on experience teaching or working with children between the ages of 5 and 14 years old.

•	Holds a background in coding, robotics, STEM education, or a closely related field.

•	Is comfortable using and teaching tools such as Scratch, Python, block-based coding platforms, or robotics kits (e.g., LEGO Mindstorms, mBot, or similar).

•	Demonstrates strong curriculum development and instructional design skills.

•	Is an excellent communicator — able to simplify complex technical concepts for varied audiences.

•	Is self-driven, organised, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

•	Is flexible and willing to travel when required.



Qualifications & Experience :



•	Diploma or Degree in Education, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

•	Minimum 2 years of teaching or training experience — experience with both children and adults is strongly preferred.

•	Current or former school teachers specialising in Computing, ICT, STEM, or related subjects are warmly encouraged to apply.

•	Experience in curriculum writing, lesson planning, or instructional design is a strong advantage.

title: DTC Video Ad Editor — Final Cut Specialist (UGC / Performance Creative)
description:
I run an AI UGC video ad service for DTC and e-commerce brands. I'm looking for a skilled video editor to handle the final edit pass on near-finished ad creatives before they're delivered to clients and launched on Meta and TikTok.

You won't be editing from scratch. The footage, voiceover, and rough structure will already be in place. Your job is to take the raw assembly and turn it into a high-converting, scroll-stopping ad.



What You'll Do



Final edits on UGC-style video ads (typically 30–60 seconds)

Add captions, text overlays, B-roll cuts, zoom punches, and pacing tweaks

Sound design — music selection, SFX, mixing voiceover with background audio

Colour grading and basic visual polish

Format for Meta and TikTok specs (9:16 vertical, hooks optimised for first 3 seconds)



What I'm Looking For



2+ years editing DTC / direct response video ads (this is non-negotiable — please don't apply if you've only edited YouTube content, weddings, or corporate work)

Strong portfolio of Meta and TikTok ads you've cut

Native-level command of CapCut and/or Premiere Pro

Understanding of what makes a UGC ad convert — hook pacing, retention edits, CTA emphasis

Fast turnaround — typically 24–48 hours per ad

Clear English communication



Bonus Points



Experience with AI-generated UGC footage (Sora, Veo, Kling)

Skilled with ElevenLabs voiceover audio cleanup

Worked with supplements, beauty, skincare, or health DTC brands



Pay

Per-video rate, negotiable based on experience and turnaround. Volume is available for the right editor.



To Apply

Message me on
: 



Send:



2–3 examples of DTC ads you've edited (ideally that ran on Meta / TikTok)

Your per-video rate

Your typical turnaround time



Skip the cover letter — just show me the work.

title: Email Automation Specialist — Klaviyo & HubSpot
description:
About SKOMA Digital

SKOMA Digital is a boutique Virtual CDO agency based in Melbourne, Australia. We work as embedded growth partners with a focused portfolio of eCommerce and B2B brands — not just service providers. Our work spans Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO,
 automation, HubSpot CRM, and Shopify CRO.

We operate lean, move fast, and hold ourselves to a high commercial standard. Every person on our team owns their lane and is accountable to the results in it.



The Role

We're looking for an
 Automation Specialist who lives and breathes lifecycle marketing. You'll own the build and ongoing management of automated flows and sequences across Klaviyo (eCommerce clients) and HubSpot (B2B and nonprofit clients). Strategy and briefs come from the Principal Advisor — your job is to bring them to life with precision, clean logic, and sequences that actually convert.

This is a hands-on execution role with real commercial impact. You'll see directly how your work drives revenue for clients.



What You'll Be Doing

Klaviyo



Build and manage core eCommerce flows: Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Browse Abandonment, Win-Back, VIP, and more

Set up segmentation logic, flow filters, and conditional splits

Build and send campaign
s for promotions, product launches, and seasonal 
nts

Monitor flow performance — open rate, CTR, revenue per recipient, unsubscribe rate — and optimise continuously

Maintain Shopify–Klaviyo integration health and custom property mapping



HubSpot



Build
 sequences, workflows, and lead nurture automations for B2B and nonprofit clients

Manage contact properties, lifecycle stages, and deal pipeline integrity

Set up and maintain suppression lists, enrollment triggers, and re-engagement flows

Support clients on HubSpot CRM hygiene and list management



General



QA every flow before activation — logic, triggers, delays, splits, and rendering across devices

Work from strategy briefs and Miro flow diagrams to deliver production-ready builds

Flag performance issues and opportunities proactively — don't wait to be asked

Coordinate with the Paid Media and SEO team where
 intersects with broader campaigns





What We're Looking For



3+ years Klaviyo experience — building and managing flows for eCommerce brands

2+ years HubSpot experience — workflows, sequences, and CRM management

Deep understanding of Klaviyo segmentation, conditional logic, and flow architecture

Proficient in HubSpot Marketing Hub and Sales Hub

Strong grasp of
 deliverability — sender reputation, list hygiene, warm-up practices

Ability to write or edit
 copy — clear, brand-aligned, and conversion-focused

Outstanding written English — professional, precise, and client-ready

Detail-oriented: broken triggers, wrong splits, or missed suppressions are not acceptable

Self-managed: you know what needs doing, you do it, and you flag early when something needs input





Bonus Points



Experience with Shopify–Klaviyo custom property builds and catalogue triggers

Familiarity with Kajabi for course or membership
 sequences

SMS flow experience alongside Klaviyo

Knowledge of A/B testing frameworks for subject lines, send times, and content





Tools You'll Use

Klaviyo · HubSpot (Marketing Hub + Sales Hub) · Shopify · Miro · Slack · Asana · Google Workspace



How We Work

Async-first with structured weekly check-ins. You'll receive clear briefs for every build, full access to strategy documentation, and direct communication with the Principal Advisor. We don't micromanage — we hire people we trust and give them the space to perform.

Overlap with AEST (Australian Eastern Standard Time) for at least 4 hours per day is required.

title: Legal Assistant
description:
Seeking a Legal Assistant



Do you want to help people get to their happily ever after?

We are an entrepreneurial family law and property litigation firm that is on track for aggressive growth and we need an experienced legal assistant to join our team and work directly with the owner, attorneys and other staff members to support the team and help our clients.

We want to be known for helping our clients come out of an extremely emotional process feeling as though they are a better person, in a better position, and that they had a team behind them that really cared and fought for them. We are growing fast, and we need an attorney who can hit the ground running.

This position will be responsible for important work, including:



· Maintain Attorneys’ calendars;

· Calendar court, discovery and filing deadlines;

· Draft
s and correspondences to clients, court personnel and 3rd parties;

· Review, file and respond to
s and facsimiles daily;

· Maintain electronic client files in MyCase;

· Monitor and assist with workflows;

· Assist in drafting and filing of routine pleadings such as Notices of Appearance, Notices

of Leaves of Absence;

Conduct electronic filing of Court documents;

· Assist with Motion assembly

· Document management

· Small tasks on an as-needed basis



If these statements appeal to you, then you may be our Legal Assistant:

- You smile when you answer the phone

- You are an amazing scheduler with a sickening degree of attention to detail

- You are very good with calendars, e-mail, spreadsheets, word processing, and the internet

- Your middle name is “No Drama”

- You are an awesome juggler of tasks and can change gears quickly

- You are a problem solver and a solution seeker

- You care about making am impactful and positive difference in the lives of others



 The ideal candidate will be able to take initiative on work that needs to be done and complete tasks with minimal hand-holding.



Prepare a cover letter with no more than TWO paragraphs and a closing sentence. In the first paragraph explain what you believe are the 3 most important qualities needed in someone who works with family law clients and why you believe they are the most important qualities. In the second paragraph, explain why you applied to this particular employment opportunity.



Do not send your resume through this website.
 your resume and cover letter in PDF format to 
 subject line of the
 should your last name (all caps), followed by the position you are applying for in lower case, followed by one word that you would use to describe yourself in all caps. [For example: SMITH paralegal AWESOME] We look forward to reviewing your application. ad. title: Admin Assistant – Front Door Lettings
description:
Front Door Lettings is a growing Bristol-based letting agency managing residential properties across Bristol, South Gloucestershire and North Somerset in England. We're looking for a highly organised, proactive admin assistant to join our remote team and play a key role in filling our properties quickly and efficiently.



This is a fast-paced, communication-heavy role where you'll be the first point of contact for people looking to rent. You'll manage enquiries, qualify applicants, coordinate the UK team's diaries, and keep the lettings process moving from first enquiry through to viewing and offer.



What You'll Be Doing



- Responding to inbound rental enquiries from platforms including Rightmove, Zoopla, UniHomes, SpareRoom,
 and phone

- Vetting applicants against our criteria before booking them in for viewings

- Managing and optimising the diaries of our UK-based letting negotiators

- Booking and confirming viewings, and notifying current tenants of upcoming access

- Following up with applicants after viewings to gather feedback and progress any offers

- Answering applicant questions about properties and tenancies clearly and professionally

- Collecting applicant details, entering them into Rightmove, and sending holding deposit letters

- Keeping the team updated on enquiry volumes and property status

- Compiling viewing feedback and sharing it with the wider team



What We're Looking For



- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

- Confident communicator - you'll be speaking and
ing with prospective tenants daily

- Comfortable working across multiple platforms and tools simultaneously

- Previous experience in admin, customer service, or property is an advantage but not essential - we'll train the right person

Able to work UK business hours (Monday to Friday, 8am - 6pm BST)



Why Join Us?



Front Door Lettings is growing quickly, and this role grows with us. You'll be a valued member of a small, tight-knit team where your work directly impacts the business. We invest in our people, use modern tools, and give you real responsibility from day one. Once you have passed probation, the salary will increase from 40,000PHP per month, to 52,000PHP per month

title: Senior Paid Media Strategist (Meta + Google)
description:
NuKind Digital is a fast-growing lead generation agency working with service-based businesses across Australia and beyond.



We are looking for a high-performance paid media operator who can take ownership of multiple client accounts across Meta and Google Ads and drive predictable, scalable lead generation outcomes.



This is not a basic campaign management role.



This is a performance ownership role for someone who thinks strategically, acts independently, and treats each ad account like a business they are responsible for growing.



You will be trusted to identify opportunities, diagnose performance issues, build testing roadmaps, improve funnel performance, and implement optimisation decisions without needing constant direction.



If you are someone who waits for instructions, this role is not for you.



What You’ll Own

You will manage and grow a portfolio of 15+ ongoing client accounts across Meta and Google Ads, with a maximum load of ~25 to 30 accounts, inclusive of the platform.



Your responsibility is not just to “run ads” but to improve the entire paid acquisition system behind each client.



That includes:

Taking full accountability for paid media performance across assigned accounts

Building and executing full-funnel paid acquisition strategies

Conducting market, competitor, audience, and keyword research

Using AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, etc. and automation to improve speed, quality, and efficiency

Shaping offer positioning, messaging, hooks, and creative testing angles

Providing landing page and CRO feedback to improve conversion performance (Tools like GoHigh Level)

Ensuring tracking, attribution, and conversion data are accurate (Tools like GoHigh Level)

Running structured tests across creatives, audiences, bidding, angles, and funnels

Making budget allocation decisions based on performance signals

Scaling what works and cutting what does not

Proactively communicating risks, insights, and growth opportunities



What Success Looks Like

You will be evaluated on outcomes, not activity.



Success in this role looks like:

Hitting or outperforming client CPA targets

Maintaining efficient and profitable account performance

Improving conversion rates month on month, where scale allows

Creating a stable lead flow across multiple client accounts

Running consistent, high-quality testing cycles

Producing documented insights and learnings from experiments

Reducing the need for leadership input over time through strong decision-making and ownership

Who We’re Looking For

We want someone who combines strategy, execution, analysis, and accountability.

Required experience

Strong hands-on 5 Years+ experience managing both Meta Ads and Google Ads

Proven experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously

Strong background in service-based lead generation

Demonstrated success in scaling accounts, not just maintaining them

Strong understanding of conversion tracking, attribution, and funnel performance

Ability to interpret data, identify bottlenecks, and act decisively

Confidence using AI tools to improve workflow, analysis, and performance output

Mindset we value

Extreme ownership

Self-direction

Commercial thinking

Analytical problem-solving

Strong communication

High accountability & focus on value delivering

Comfortable making decisions under uncertainty

Proactive behaviour without waiting to be told what to do

What This Role Is Not

This role is not for:

Someone who only knows how to set up campaigns

Someone who needs daily direction

Someone who waits for briefs before taking action

Someone who focuses on activity instead of commercial outcomes

Someone who hides behind platfor
trics without understanding business impact

We are not hiring a task executor.

We are hiring someone who can help own and scale the paid acquisition function.

Why Join NuKind Digital

Work with a fast-growing, performance-focused agency

Manage diverse service-based lead gen accounts

Join a team with copy, design, dev, and client success support

High-autonomy environment for strong operators

Opportunity to grow into deeper department leadership over time

Competitive & above threshold salary based on experience

Performance-based incentives/ commissions for the right candidate

Paid trial available for shortlisted applicants

How to Apply (Each Step Is Mandatory)



To apply, send us:

Your CV or LinkedIn profile

A short summary of your experience managing Meta and Google Ads

Examples of service-based lead generation accounts you have worked on

Key performance outcomes you helped achieve

The AI tools you currently use in your paid media workflow

A short Loom/video introduction is a strong advantage



To apply, please accomplish this form: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZIAd4ux6mlIys0e9xKokLu8R1bYejt4zMNsYKsjJPXzdXyQ/viewform?usp=header



We are looking for people who can think clearly, move fast, and own outcomes.

title: UGC & Project Manager
description:
What this position is responsible for:



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive UGC & Project Manager to oversee creator relationships and manage the operational flow of UGC campaigns. This role plays a critical part in ensuring that creator partnerships, campaign deliverables, and internal collaboration run smoothly from start to finish. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced digital marketing environment, is detail-oriented, and can confidently coordinate between creators, internal teams, and clients to ensure campaigns are executed at a high standard.



Requirements/Experience:

- 1–3+ years of experience in UGC management, influencer marketing, social media marketing, or digital marketing operations



- Experience sourcing, recruiting, and managing UGC creators or influencers across platforms such as TikTok and Instagram



- Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



- Excellent communication and negotiation skills when working with creators and coordinating with internal teams



- Ability to manage timelines, deliverables, and campaign documentation with a high level of attention to detail



- Familiarity with social media trends, creator ecosystems, and UGC-style content



- Experience reviewing content and ensuring it follows brand guidelines, scripts, and campaign briefs



- Proficiency with project management tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms (e.g., Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Trello, etc.)



- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, delays, or bottlenecks early



- Self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently in a remote environment





Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



UGC Management



- Source and recruit high-quality UGC creators across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and other relevant social media channels to support ongoing campaigns.



- Build, maintain, and continuously grow a reliable roster of creators, ensuring access to talent that aligns with brand positioning and campaign goals.



- Conduct creator outreach and relationship management, including communication, negotiation of deliverables, and maintaining professional partnerships.



- Distribute campaign briefs, scripts, and brand guidelines to creators, ensuring all expectations and creative requirements are clearly communicated.



- Review and evaluate creator submissions to ensure content meets campaign standards before forwarding for internal or client approval.



- Track and document creator performance, reliability, and content quality to inform future collaborations.



- Maintain and organize creator databases, ensuring accurate records of contact details, past performance, and campaign participation.



Project Management



- Coordinate campaign timelines and deliverables between creators, internal team members, and clients to ensure smooth campaign execution.



- Monitor campaign schedules to ensure all deliverables are completed on time and meet required deadlines.



- Organize and maintain campaign assets and documentation, including briefs, scripts, and project files.



- Track overall project progress, proactively identifying potential delays, bottlenecks, or issues that may impact timelines.



- Communicate updates across teams to maintain alignment and ensure all stakeholders are informed throughout the campaign lifecycle.



- Support the overall campaign workflow by ensuring tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities are clearly defined and executed.



Apply today to join our team!

Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

title: Part-Time Jewelry CAD Designer – MatrixGold Expert
description:
Job Title:

Part-Time Jewelry CAD Designer – MatrixGold Expert with 5+ Years Bench Experience (100% Remote / Home-Based in Philippines)



Job Description:

U.S.-based fine jewelry company looking for a highly skilled Jewelry CAD Designer who truly understands real-world manufacturing. This is a part-time, long-term role for only 10 hours per week (flexible scheduling, but with good overlap on U.S. Eastern Time when needed).



You MUST have:

•  Minimum 5 years actual bench jeweler experience (hand-fabricating, soldering, setting stones, casting, finishing — this is non-negotiable)

•  Expert level in Gemvision MatrixGold (and strong Rhino)

•  Ability to create models that are 100% manufacturable — you instantly know what will cast cleanly, set properly, and finish beautifully

•  Strong portfolio with photos of real finished physical jewelry you have personally made (not just renders)



Nice to have:

•  Experience with ZBrush, CounterSketch, or 3Design

•  Familiarity with U.S./European casting houses and growing/printing workflows



Position details:

•  Part-time: exactly 10 hours per week (ongoing, long-term)

•  100% remote — work from home anywhere in the Philippines



•  Compensation: ?25,000 – ?35,000 per month (paid in USD equivalent ? $420 – $590/month, negotiable based on experience and portfolio)

•  Paid via PayPal, Wise, or bank transfer

•  Possibility to increase hours later if it’s a great fit



If you spent 5+ years at the bench making jewelry by hand and then became a MatrixGold expert, this easy part-time role is perfect for you.



To apply, send 

1.  Your CV

2.  Portfolio / Google Drive link (must include photos of actual finished jewelry you made by hand + recent MatrixGold files/renders)

3.  Quick note: years of bench experience + types of jewelry you fabricated by hand + your expected monthly rate for 10 hrs/week

We will only reply to applicants who clearly meet the 5+ years hands-on bench requirement. CAD-only designers (no real bench background) — please do not apply.



Looking forward to finding our new part-time tea
mber!

title: Virtul Assistant Content Creator for Crypto & Stocks Brands — Slideshows, Reels, Tweets
description:
About the Role

I run two content brands in the crypto and stock market space. Both need consistent daily content output to keep growing.

I'm looking for a long-term VA who can take ownership of daily content production. You won't need to come up with strategy or design from scratch — full brand guidelines, design systems, and content frameworks are provided. You execute the system at high quality, every day.

This is a high-volume, high-consistency role. If you love content creation and want a stable long-term gig with room to grow, this is for you.



Daily Tasks

For Brand 1 (Crypto personal brand):



- 1 short-form video per day (Reel/TikTok format) — flex video or B-roll with text overlay caption

- Occasional Canva slideshows (8-slide format, premium aesthetic)



For Brand 2 (Stocks data tool):



10 tweets per day, mix of:



Stock chart screenshots showing data alpha (specific stocks that pumped after our signals)

Quotes from famous traders, hedge fund managers, and CEOs





Occasional Canva slideshows (8-slide format)



Total daily output: 1 reel + 10 tweets, plus occasional slideshow work.



Required Skills



Strong Canva skills — must follow a specific design system precisely (colors, typography, layout, hierarchy). No generic templates.

Capable mobile video editor — comfortable with CapCut, InShot, or similar tools for short reels with text overlays

English fluency — writing tweet captions and video text

Detail-oriented — premium brand aesthetic, no sloppy work

Reliable daily delivery — consistency is the entire job

Ability to follow brand guidelines exactly — full design system, colors, fonts, frameworks provided





Nice to Have



Familiarity with crypto, stocks, or finance content

Experience running social media for a creator or business brand

Ability to source stock images, B-roll footage, and quote material

Understanding of viral hooks and short-form content trends





What You Get



Stable monthly base pay

Performance bonuses for content that hits viral metrics (over X views/likes, etc.)

Long-term role — looking for someone to grow with for 6-12 months minimum

Salary increases for great work

Full design system and brand guidelines provided — you won't need to invent the look

Direct communication with the brand owner

Flexible schedule — work when you want as long as deadlines are met





How to Apply

To be considered, send the following:



Your portfolio link — show Canva work, video edits, social media content (especially in finance, business, or lifestyle niches if available)

One sample tweet idea — write a sample tweet showing a stock chart screenshot with a viral-style hook (use any stock as your example). Show me your hook-writing skill.

One sample Canva slide — design a single 1080x1080 slide on the topic "Why insider trading data beats analyst predictions." Use a dark, premium aesthetic with clean typography. Send as image.

Your availability — hours per day, timezone, and start date

Confirm you're okay with the $150/month base + bonus structure

Answer this in 2-3 sentences: What makes content go viral on social media in your opinion?



Applications missing any of these six items will be skipped.



Important

I've worked with VAs before. The ones who succeed are the ones who:



Read job descriptions fully and respond to every requirement

Have actual portfolios, not just claims

Take ownership of quality

Communicate proactively



If you skim job posts and send generic copy-paste applications, please don't apply. I'm looking for one quality long-term hire, not 50 mediocre ones.

title: Accountant
description:
Job Title: Accountant (Cost Accounting & Financial Operations)

Department: Business Services

Reports To: Owner / Leadership Team

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time



About Town Web and HeyGov

Town Web is a Wisconsin-based digital agency specializing in website design, development, and ongoing maintenance for municipalities across the United States. Through our sister brand HeyGov, we empower local governments with digital tools that simplify services like online forms, payments, and permit requests, making civic engagement more efficient and accessible for residents. Together, Town Web and HeyGov provide a complete digital ecosystem for municipalities, from modern websites to integrated citizen-facing solutions.



As our organization continues to grow, we’re strengthening our financial and operational foundations to better connect costs, performance, and profitability in real time, ensuring we deliver reliable, scalable value to every community we serve.



Role Overview

We are hiring a full-time in-house accountant who can deliver cost-accounting discipline, weekly profitability reporting, and proactive expense control across all product lines. This role goes beyond bookkeeping, it’s about bringing clarity to how each project, launch, and event affects the bottom line.

You will work within Xero (our primary accounting platform) to establish clear cost structures, reporting methods, and financial rhythms that give leadership weekly visibility into margins and spending.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Operations & Reporting

-Manage full accounting operations in Xero, including general ledger, journal entries, bank reconciliations, and financial statements.

-Produce weekly reports on:

--Project and product margins

--Labor efficiency and utilization

--AR and collections

-Expense highlights and variances

-Prepare monthly and quarterly financial summaries with recommendations for improvement.

-Work with leadership to build EOS-aligned financial scorecards and ensure data consistency across teams.



Cost Accounting & Profitability Tracking

-Implement and maintain cost-per-project accounting to understand true margins.

-Track direct labor (developers, designers, project managers).

-Allocate overhead (software, hosting, administrative costs).

-Monitor profitability per website build or client engagement.

-Develop standard cost templates and reporting methods to ensure consistency across all projects.

-Support pricing validation by analyzing margins per product, package, and promotion.

-Produce post-launch and post-conference ROI reports, linking actual spend to lead generation and revenue impact.



Expense Maintenance & System Audits

-Own the subscription and system audit process: regularly review all active tools (Adobe, Figma, Zoom, etc.) to eliminate waste and redundancies.

-Maintain a central expense tracker linking costs to projects, departments, and events.

-Monitor vendor payments, renewals, and contract terms to ensure accuracy and savings.

-Enforce expense-approval processes and ensure clean records for audit readiness.



Accounts Receivable & Collections

-Oversee client invoicing, payment schedules, and follow-ups.

-Maintain current aging reports and reduce AR > 30 days.

-Coordinate with Sales for accurate invoicing on new subscriptions, websites, renewals, upgrades and upsells.



Compliance & Payroll

-Prepare and process payroll for employees and contractors (via Gusto, Xero Payroll, or equivalent).

-Support tax filings and compliance in coordination with the external CPA or tax attorney.

-Establish internal consistency between bookkeeping and tax reporting to minimize rework.



Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

-Partner with leadership, operations, and marketing to tie cost data to decision-making.

-Participate in cross-functional reviews: e.g., evaluating conference ROI, campaign effectiveness, and staffing costs.

-Support leadership with budget planning, forecasts, and scenario modeling.

-Document processes and train backup staff for continuity.



What Success Looks Like

-Weekly visibility into which projects and launches are profitable (and which aren’t).

-Zero waste: all dormant subscriptions and unnecessary expenses eliminated.

-Accurate and timely reporting: Weekly scorecards delivered by Tuesday each week.

-Conference ROI clearly tracked, linking spend to lead conversions.

-Collections improved, with AR > 30 days reduced to under 10%.

Tighter cost controls enabling better pricing, hiring, and raise decisions.



Qualifications

Required:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

-Must have 5+ years working at a growing business. Preferably an agency or SaaS that is doing $3M+ a year

-Demonstrated expertise with Xero (bookkeeping, reporting, and integrations)

-Proven experience with cost accounting or job-order costing

-Strong analytical skills; able to turn data into insights and recommendations

-Excellent attention to detail, organization, and accountability in a remote setup

-Employment from past employers/business references will verified

-Knowledge of U.S. accounting practices a must



Preferred:

-Familiarity with Profit First, Simple Numbers, or similar financial frameworks

-Experience in multi-entity or SaaS-style businesses with recurring revenue

-Proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets (pivot tables, formulas, dashboards)

-CPA or equivalent certification is an advantage.



Compensation & Benefits

-Competitive salary: $1,800 to $2,500 USD per month, depending on experience

-Paid time off

-Fully remote setup aligned with U.S. Central Time hours

-Long-term opportunity to build and lead the finance function of a growing international company



Why Join Town Web and HeyGov

-You’ll be stepping into a pivotal role, bringing financial clarity to a company scaling fast. Your work will shape how the leadership team makes decisions on pricing, hiring, and investments, while ensuring every dollar is accounted for with purpose.



Interested? Visit our official job posting in Workable: 



Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:

Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:

.sg

To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork.

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: CRM & Tech Automation Specialist
description:
We're one of the fastest-growing agencies in the education space — we've driven $15M+ in sales for our clients in just 1.5 years, and we're scaling fast. We're looking for a CRM and tech expert who wants to grow with us, not just clock in and clock out.



This is not a "just do my tasks and log off" role. If that's what you're looking for, please don't apply. We want an innovator — someone who spots problems before they're reported, suggests better ways to do things, and takes genuine ownership of the systems they manage.



What you'll be doing:

- You'll be the tech and automation backbone for two client accounts, responsible for:

- Managing and optimizing CRM workflows, automations, and integrations across GoHighLevel (GHL) and Close CRM

- Responding to bug/error notifications within 5–10 minutes and resolving them with precision

- Obsessing over the details — small issues don't get ignored, they get fixed properly

- Proactively identifying weak points in our systems and improving them before they break

- Building automations that save time and scale our operations



Who we're looking for:

- Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) and Close CRM is required — please don't apply without it

title: Bookkeeper
description:
At MBS Accountants we are expanding our team due to continued growth.



This is a rare opportunity to join a small team in a leading innovative accountancy practice and be a fundamental part of helping business owners get a grip on their finances and make leaps towards achieving their goals.



What we are offering



As well as getting to be a tea
mber in a leading innovative accountancy practice you will also get



Competitive Salary (PHP45,000 per month)

40-hour working week

Extra annual leave over Christmas/New Year

2 weeks off over the festive period

13th-month pay scheme

Clear steps for growth in your role and salary

Regular fun (sometimes competitive) team get-togethers (online escape rooms, quizzes, etc)

Quarterly scheduled input on company direction

Full training and support

Philhealth and possibly full health cover



Here are some thoughts and comments from the team



I love the quarterly reviews as it gets everyone involved and all opinions are listened to – Lauren (Senior Bookkeeper)

Everyone cares and is really helpful so you are never worried about asking questions – Regina (Administrator)

We have an ability to have a say on our and the company’s future, it’s not just a job it’s about our personal life too – Georgia (Client Manager)

I enjoy the work culture and environment as there is a right mix of professionalism and fun – Gerald (Accountant)



About the role

Well, you’ll need to be highly organised with a keen eye for detail. Your day-to-day tasks will consist of admin duties and some bookkeeping.



As an overview, your tasks will involve –



Entering data into our CRM & technical systems

Updating data in our CRM & technical systems

Managing
s

Chasing clients, suppliers and other accountants for information

Chasing tea
mbers for information to deadlines

Processing invoices and receipts

Processing sales invoices

Reconciling bank accounts

HMRC registrations and authorisations

Confirmation statement preparation and filing

Running payroll

Creating, amending and updating processes

Plus more



We are not expecting someone to join our team with the full range of skills. We are a highly systemised and process-driven company with lots of tools to help you learn. Currently a Filipino VA covers this role and will assist with teaching areas of development. A can-do attitude and organisation skills are essential.



About MBS Accountants

At MBS we do more than just accounting – we help business owners take control of their numbers, grow their profits, and build the lifestyle and freedom they want. Our approach combines smart technology, clear strategies, and straight-talking coaching to make a real difference for our clients.



We’re also building something exciting ourselves. MBS is a fast-growing, forward-thinking firm that’s reshaping what accounting can look like in the modern world. We use AI and the latest systems to keep ahead, and we’re on an ambitious path of growth through innovation and acquisitions.



For our team, this means being part of a company where:

• Everyone knows the bigger picture and where we’re headed.

• There’s space to grow your skills and take on new challenges.

• We combine professionalism with a fun, relaxed working environment.

• Work-life balance is valued and supported.



Joining MBS Accountants

At MBS Accountants we are fuelled by helping business owners to stop surviving and start thriving. We are also focused on the quality of life of our team and we support a healthy work-life balance.



We are looking for people who fit our values



Do what you say – Nobody likes being let down and we think it’s key you don’t set unrealistic expectations. Seek to understand the importance of the task and any deadlines and agree realistic timescales and stick to them or communicate early regarding challenges.



Open and honest – Being a closed book doesn’t help anyone. We don’t believe work and home are two different lives. Life is just life. By being open and honest about your whole life we can be empathetic to your circumstances and together we can work towards growth and positivity.



Take responsibility – Work-life balance is key and fundamental we believe to living a healthy life. We have core hours but each role also has key outcomes and responsibilities. There will be occasions where flexibility may be needed in order to achieve those outcomes and responsibilities and taking responsibility to act accordingly is key.



Team player – As a team we support and empower each other. There will be occasions where you will need to go outside of the standard scope of your role to help out a colleague. This shouldn’t be because we expect it but because you think it’s the right thing to do.



Respect – Respect is everything. It should be a given. It should not come just because of somebodies position but simply because we are all human beings. Being able to be candid with someone about their weaknesses and mistakes when done with love is an absolute sign of respect.





Is this role right for you?



If you can answer yes to all the below then this role is perfect for you!



Do you love being organised?

Do you have a can-do attitude?

Do you like data to be stored accurately?

Do you like things to be easy to find?

Do you question things that don't seem right?

Do you ask questions to understand how you can make a greater impact?

Do you enjoy challenges and recognise when to ask for help and when to keep pushing on?

Are you keen to practice regular self-improvement/personal development?

Do you like being recognised for all the hard work you put in?





Want to work with us?



If this sounds like your dream job then we’d love for you to join our team.

1 - Apply here on onlinejobs.ph

2 - Send a video to 

The video should

A - Make sure we know which applicant you are and can match you up

B - Answer the following questions (give us an idea of you as a person)

i) A quick introduction name, age, where you live

ii) Tell us about what you like doing in your spare time (hobbies, interests, etc)?

iii) Who is in your family?

iv) Which is your favourite of our values and why?

v) Why you would love to work for us?

vi) What is the best thing you can bring to us?

title: Client Relations Specialist $8-$12/hour
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based short-term rental (Airbnb) property management company operating in over 10 states. Our team is remote-first and performance-driven. We specialize in turning underperforming vacation rentals into high-earning listings through smart pricing, guest support, and streamlined operations.



We’re looking for a Client Relations Specialist to join our growing team. You’ll serve as the main point of contact for our property owners helping clarify performance, answer questions, resolve concerns, and maintain long-term satisfaction. You’ll also help streamline internal communications, improve SOPs, and ensure every owner has a great experience working with us.





Key Responsibilities

• Communicate with property owners via
 and phone to provide timely updates and support

• Answer questions related to statements, pricing, calendar availability, fees, and performance

• Coordinate with tea
mbers to resolve owner concerns

• Deliver monthly property performance summaries or reporting updates

• Support onboarding with clarification of policies, expectations, and account access

• Flag common issues and help update internal documentation and FAQs

• Support the onboarding, offboarding, and listing optimization processes





Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong interpersonal and client-facing communication skills

• High attention to detail, especially with numbers, fees, or dates

• Fast, reliable internet and a professional remote work setup

• Willing to work EST hours

• Tech-savvy and confident using tools like Hostaway, Google Workspace, Slack, and Airbnb

• Self-motivated, organized, and comfortable handling multiple threads of communication

• Experience in client support, customer success, or property management is a strong plus





Salary & Growth

• $8/hr + bonus depending on performance

• Bonuses for great performance and added value

• Long-term position with opportunity to move into team lead roles





How to Apply (All Steps Required)

1. Send a 2-minute voice recording introducing yourself:

• Share your experience working with clients, owners, or in customer support

• Talk about a time you helped turn around a difficult situation with a customer or client

• Use Vocaroo or a Drive link (set to public)



2. Answer this short prompt in writing:

• What’s one thing you think a property owner would want to know at the end of each month, and how would you present that information clearly?



3. Attach your resume with your current work status and past experience



Why Join Us

• Long-term remote job with stable bi-weekly pay

• Bonus pay for high-quality work

• Team that values results, initiative, and consistency

• Fast-growing company in the Airbnb space





We’re actively interviewing. Apply now!

title: Video Editor / Motion Graphics Specialist (Meta-first)
description:
Our creative output directly impacts performance.



Right now, we need someone who can turn raw footage into high-performing creatives built primarily for Meta (Instagram/Facebook), content that drives attention, retention, and conversions.

We don’t need a traditional video editor. We need someone who understands what makes people stop scrolling and stay watching.



Most of your work will focus on paid social creatives, not just long-form video editing.

We’re not looking for someone who just cuts clips together. We need someone who can think, analyze performance, and create with clear intent.

— Andy Gray, Founder & CEO



IMPORTANT: Please read below before submitting your application.



In the application form, you'll be required to submit a 2-minute video introduction answering: Who are you, and why do you think you're the best fit for this role?

You'll also be asked a few short written questions. If your video checks out, we'll invite you to interview.



In your application, use the Code: 8000. Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



WHO ARE WE

The Graygency is a performance marketing agency working with 7–8 figure DTC e-commerce brands across the UK, US, and UAE. We call ourselves Performance Scientists; we're in the P&L, not just the ad account. We're building an agency powered by systems, AI, and commercial thinking, not headcount.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:



Video Editing & Content Creation

- Create and edit performance-driven video creatives for Meta (Instagram/Facebook)

- Repurpose content into high-performing Reels and paid social creatives 

- Adapt winning creatives for TikTok and YouTube where relevant

- Identify key hooks and 
nts from raw footage

- Optimize videos for retention, engagement, and platform behavior



Motion Graphics & Creative Enhancement 

- Add dynamic motion graphics, text overlays, and visual effects

- Create scroll-stopping thumbnails and visual hooks

- Enhance storytelling through visuals, pacing, and structure



Performance-Driven Editing 

- Understand what makes content convert; not just look good

- Optimize cuts, pacing, and structure based on performance insights

- Adapt and scale winning creatives across platforms (Meta, then TikTok/YouTube) 



Collaboration

- Work closely with Creative Strategists and Media Buyers

- Contribute ideas to improve creative performance

- Align editing decisions with campaign goals and strategy



Ad Hoc Creative Work 

- Support video ads, testimonials, and brand content

- Jump into fast-turnaround projects when needed



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Videos drive strong retention and engagement

- Content drives performance on Meta (CTR, CPA, engagement), with strong adaptation across other platforms 

- High volume of quality content produced consistently

- Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality

- You contribute ideas; not just execute



The Skills We Need You To Bring

- 2–5 years experience in video editing and motion graphics

- Strong portfolio of Meta-first (Instagram/Facebook) content, with experience in TikTok and/or YouTube 

- Proven experience creating high-performing short-form content

- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

- Strong understanding of: Hooks, Retention, Pacing, Platform-native content

- Performance mindset; you know content needs to convert

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, remote environment

- Strong communication and project management skills

- Excellent English (written and verbal)



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience with AI video tools (Runway, Pika, Sora)

- Understanding of YouTube analytics and retention metrics

- Experience working with remote teams

- You create your own content (YouTube, TikTok, UGC-style)

- 3D or advanced motion design skills

- Familiarity with ClickUp, Asana, or similar tools



Red Flags (Don't Apply If…)

- You focus only on aesthetics and ignore performance

- You’ve never created content for social platforms

- You don’t understand retention, hooks, or pacing

- You wait for instructions instead of thinking creatively

- You struggle with feedback or iteration

- You can’t keep up with fast production cycles



What We Offer

- Base salary up to $15,000 USD annually + bonus scheme

- Paid public holidays and generous leave

- Direct collaboration with strategists and media buyers

- Ongoing training and weekly workshops

- Clear career progression with mentorship

- Opportunity to work on global e-commerce brands





Our Culture

We believe in doing things well at The Graygency; we are constantly looking for ways to innovate and improve the delivery of our product. Every day we turn up and deliver our best work as a team in order to deliver the best results for the brands that trust us with their marketing budgets.



If you are ready to work and have the skills required, please submit your application directly here:

title: Outbound Sales Specialist (Cold Calling – Appointment Setting)
description:
L’EVATE is hiring on behalf of a fast-growing Canadian financial services company.

We help businesses build high-performing remote teams and we’re looking for a strong outbound sales professional to support senior leadership by booking qualified meetings.



If you are not comfortable being on the phone every day starting conversations with strangers, this is not for you.



We’re hiring someone who can confidently call mortgage brokers and agents across Canada, build interest, and book meetings for senior leadership.



This is not a script-reading role.

This is about thinking, listening, and guiding conversations.



What you’ll be doing:

- Making 50+ outbound calls per day 

- Calling mortgage brokers, agents, and banking professionals across Canada 

- Building rapport quickly and sounding confident on the phone 

- Handling objections and keeping conversations moving 

- Booking 2–3 qualified meetings per day 

- Following up via
 and LinkedIn 

- Keeping CRM notes clean and up to date



What we’re looking for:

- Strong spoken English (clear, confident, easy to understand) 

- 3-5 years' experience in cold calling, sales, or appointment setting 

- Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent 

- Someone who can think on their feet (not just read scripts) 

- Strong work ethic and reliability



Nice to have:

- Mortgage or financial services experience 

- Experience booking meetings for executives 

- CRM or LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience



This role is for you if:

- You enjoy talking to new people every day

- You are competitive and results-driven

- You don’t lose energy after hearing “no”

- You take ownership of your numbers



IMPORTANT — READ THIS

We will ONLY review applicants who follow the instructions below.

Step 1: Include the word “Closer” at the top of your application  (This tells us you actually read the post)

Step 2: Submit a 2 minute video answering:

1.  Give a quick introduction of your background in outbound sales and cold calling

2. Role-play exactly how you open a cold call in the first 10 seconds.

3. Handle this objection:

 “I’m not interested — just send me something.”
