title: Virtual Assistant (Outreach + Inbox) — Events/Entertainment
description:
Virtual Assistant (Outreach + Inbox) — Events/Entertainment



Role overview

We’re a boutique creative events & entertainment company working across London + Copenhagen. We’re hiring a Virtual Assistant to run high-volume, high-quality outreach and keep our lead pipeline organised.

This is a straightforward execution role: work from our spreadsheets, send personalised
s to prospects, and manage follow-ups across
 and Instagram.

Key outcomes



    More qualified conversations booked

    A tidy inbox and a trackable outreach pipeline

    Consistent daily outreach volume without sacrificing accuracy or tone



Core responsibilities



    Outbound
 outreach (primary)

        Work through our lead spreadsheets and send individual
s to each contact (no bulk blasting)

        Light personalisation per lead (name, company, event type/location, relevant note)

        Use our templates + adjust wording to fit the prospect

        Track what was sent and when (status updates in the spreadsheet)

    Instagram follow-up + DM management (required)

        After sending an
, send a short Instagram DM follow-up using our approved scripts

        Monitor replies and continue the conversation politely until it’s ready to be handed over

        Keep DM inbox organised (message requests, follow-ups, flagged priority leads)

        Track DM activity + outcomes in the spreadsheet (contacted / replied / booked call / not a fit)

    Inbox management

        Sort and label incoming
s

        Flag anything urgent or high-value

        Draft replies for approval when needed

        Maintain a follow-up schedule (e.g., 2–3 follow-ups per lead unless told otherwise)

    Spreadsheet + admin support

        Keep lead lists clean (dedupe, correct names, missing fields)

        Log replies, outcomes, and next steps



Daily workload & schedule



    4–6 hours per day, Monday–Friday

    Must be comfortable with repetitive, detail-oriented work and hitting daily targets



Performance expectations (targets)



   
 throughput: aim for 40–60 personalised
s per hour once trained

        Quality matters more than speed: correct names, correct company, correct offer, no sloppy mistakes

    DM follow-ups: consistent daily follow-up on the same leads via Instagram (using scripts)

    Accuracy: near-zero typos in names/companies; clean tracking in the spreadsheet

    Responsiveness: acknowledge priority messages quickly during working hours



Tools you’ll use



    Gmail (or our
 platform)

    Google Sheets / Excel

    Instagram (Meta Business Suite access may be provided)

    Templates + brand tone guidelines (we provide)



Requirements



    Strong written English

    Experience with cold outreach / lead generation 
 + Instagram DMs)

    Reliable internet + laptop/desktop

title: Digital Creative Tech Enthusiast
description:
--- Intro ---

Aerodynamics - invisible, incredibly complex, yet supercool.



Why? When done right, it makes hyper cars go faster around the track, boosts the range of aircraft and helps athletes achieve medals.



Traditionally, running CFD simulations (computational fluid dynamics) was reserved for companies with large budgets (to buy the necessary software & hardware) and experts with time (to set up & process the simulations).



At AirShaper, we flipped the script.



In 2018, we launched a fully automated cloud platform where anyone with a 3D model (yes, even a 12 year old student) can run a simulation.



See for yourself: 



And it's working - we're growing fast!



That's where you come in - a true techie, with a talent for creating content & stories.



--- Time to level up ---

You'll not start from scratch - we've built a +100k subscriber YouTube channel (
), broke records (657 km/h drone, 447.8 km/h custom Lambo, ...) and so on.



So yes, we've had tremendous fun!



But we maxed out - the quality of our videos, the consistency of our posts, the strategy, the collaborations with others... all of this can be done better, faster, cooler.



There is so much potential out there!



--- The job at hand ---

Massive disclaimer - we love experimenting, moving fast and trying new things.



So the description below will change for sure. You'll be in the driver seat though - we hope you like taking that responsibility.



- Content creation: it all starts from the content.

We're heavily marketing driven, and to be seen, you need compelling content. You'll be creating visuals, videos, articles and more.

- Storytelling: remember the complex field of aerodynamics?

Your job is to make it tangible, enthuse people and make them see the possibilities of AirShaper.

- Collaborations: AirShaper yapping about how cool we are is one approach.



But handing over our product to others and have them talk about us is way cooler!

- New territory: we're expanding into markets, including India, China, ...

Different channels, different strategies - time to leave your cultural heritage behind and see things through their eyes!



--- Jump right in with these skills ---

We're looking for someone to hit the ground running:

- Fluent in English

- 5+ years of experience creating & publishing content

- You know your way around the right tools to create videos, plan posts, ...



And we hope you're brain is wired as follows:

- You absolutely love technology & engineering.

Are you an F1 geek? Awesome! Do you fly (and crash) drones in your free time? Brilliant!

Did you build prototype catapults as a kid? Good news! (Perhaps not for the neighbors).

- You're flexible, learn fast, conclude what works & what doesn't

- You're thorough: gather the data & insights to back up decisions

- You're used to communicate in a professional way, directly with customers / influencers



--- Let's grow together ---

You would join an extremely motivated 2 people team - super small & efficient.



We'll start off with a part time freelance position (no agencies please).



As you help us grow, you too could grow into a full time position!



--- Location ---

Big plus if you live in Belgium, but we're open to remote work as well.



--- If this is your thing... ---

What better way to introduce yourself for a content job than to... create content!



--- To apply, send us: ---



- A video introduction of yourself

- The 3 coolest campaigns you've worked on in the past

- Why AirShaper makes your eyes twinkle



Why AirShaper

- Fast growing brand

- Tons of energy!

- You'll matter a lot - joining a 2-people team

- Mix of existing & new social channels

- International focus

- Work directly with the founder

title: Real Estate Lead Manager (Cold Calling Follow-Up Specialist)
description:
We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company (Max House) looking to hire a Lead Manager / Follow-Up Specialist to help manage and convert leads into real opportunities.



This is NOT just a cold calling role.



Your primary responsibility is to follow up with homeowners, build rapport, and move conversations toward setting appointments.



You will be working directly with the owner and part of a growing team focused on building a consistent pipeline of deals.



???? RESPONSIBILITIES

 • Follow up with leads (inbound + outbound)

 • Call homeowners and have real conversations (not just read scripts)

 • Qualify sellers based on:

 • Motivation

 • Timeline

 • Property condition

 • Price expectations

 • Set appointments for acquisitions

 • Update CRM (REsimpli) with detailed notes

 • Re-engage older leads (follow-up is critical)

 • Flag hot leads immediately



???? WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 • Strong English (clear, natural speaking voice)

 • Experience in real estate (cold calling, ISA, or lead manager preferred)

 • Comfortable on the phone and able to build rapport

 • Organized and detail-oriented

 • Reliable and responsive (communication is VERY important)

 • Able to work independently and follow instructions



?? IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING



This role requires:

 • consistent daily communication

 • reliability and follow-through

 • proactive updates during your shift



If you are not responsive or do not communicate consistently, this will NOT be a good fit.



???? SCHEDULE

 • Part-time (4–5 hours/day) or Full-time available

 • U.S. Eastern Time (EST)



Preferred working hours:

 • 4:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST (follow-up window)

 • Additional hours available for the right candidate



???? PAY STRUCTURE

 • $4/hour base

 • $5–$10 per qualified appointment set

 • $100 bonus per closed deal



This is a performance-based role with strong upside for consistent performers.



???? TOOLS WE USE

 • REsimpli (CRM)

 • Dialers (Batch Dialer, CallTools, ReadyMode)

 • Google Sheets

 • Slack / Messaging for communication



Experience with these tools is a plus, but not required (we will train the right person).



???? HOW TO APPLY



Please include the following:

 1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

 2. Your real estate experience

 3. Answer this question:



???? “How do you qualify a motivated seller?”

 4. Include the word “BLUE” at the top of your application so we know you read everything



???? FINAL NOTE



We are building a real system and team—not just hiring someone to make calls.



If you are reliable, communicative, and willing to improve, there is opportunity for long-term growth with us.

title: Paid Social Strategist
description:
Our paid social performance directly impacts business growth.



Right now, we need someone who can manage, optimize, and scale ad accounts; not just maintain them.

We don’t need someone who just “runs ads.”



We need someone who understands performance, profitability, and decision-making behind the numbers.

We’re not looking for a passive account manager waiting for direction.



We need someone who can take ownership, think commercially, and continuously improve results.

— Andy Gray, Founder & CEO



IMPORTANT: Please read below before submitting your application.



In the application form, you'll be required to submit a 2-minute video introduction answering: Who are you, and why do you think you're the best fit for this role?

You'll also be asked a few short written questions. If your video checks out, we'll invite you to interview.



In your application, use the Code: 8000. Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



WHO WE ARE

The Graygency is a performance marketing agency working with 7–8 figure DTC e-commerce brands across the UK, US, and UAE. 



We call ourselves Performance Scientists; we're in the P&L, not just the ad account. 



We're building an agency powered by systems, AI, and commercial thinking, not headcount.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO

Paid Social Management 

- Deliver the Paid Social Strategy to hit platform acquisition and retention targets

- Manage and optimise paid social ad accounts (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

- Execute and iterate campaigns based on performance data

- Monitor budgets, pacing, and performance daily

- Ensure campaigns are driving profitable growth (not just vanity metrics)



Strategy & Execution 

- Implement strategies and testing frameworks to drive profitable growth

- Assist Paid Media Strategists in executing digital strategy

- Contribute to marketing and content strategy for client brands



Performance & Insights 

- Produce reports, strategic insights, and innovation to improve KPIs

- Translate data into clear recommendations for clients

- Stay up to date with trends, platforms, and industry data (IPA, WARC, etc.)



Client & Account Ownership 

- Support communication with clients (weekly/monthly updates)

- Deliver insights, reports, and clear recommendations

- Take ownership of performance; not just execution

- Build strong relationships and trust with clients



Continuous Improvement

- Stay up to date with platform changes, trends, and best practices

- Bring new ideas and strategies proactively

- Identify opportunities to improve efficiency, scale, and profitability

- Contribute to internal systems and processes



The Skills We Need You To Bring

- 2 to 5+ years experience in Paid Social (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

- Experience managing ad accounts and budgets

- Strong analytical and data-driven mindset

- Understanding of performance marketing (not just boosting posts)

- Experience in a client-facing role

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, remote environment

- Strong communication and collaboration skills



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience with DTC e-commerce brands

- Familiarity with tools like Triple Whale, Northbeam, Shopify (Analytics), Data Studio/Two Minutes Reports/similar, DataFeedWatch/similar

- Understanding of creative strategy and hooks

- Experience working with creative teams

- Exposure to AI tools and automation



What Success Looks Like

- Accounts scale profitably (not just spend increases)

- Clear improvements in CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin

- Strong testing velocity across creatives and audiences

- Clients trust your insights and strategic direction

- You take ownership; not just complete tasks



Red Flags (Don't Apply If…)

- You only execute tasks without understanding performance

- You focus on metrics without understanding profitability

- You wait for instructions instead of thinking proactively

- You struggle with feedback or iteration

- You can’t keep up with a fast-paced environment



What We Offer 

- Salary Band: £40,000 – £50,000 per annum

- 5 weeks holiday per year

- Fully flexible working hours

- Employee assistance program

- MacBook provided

- Employee pension scheme (3% contribution)

- Rapid progression opportunities



Our Culture

We believe in doing things well at The Graygency; we are constantly looking for ways to innovate and improve the delivery of our product. Every day we turn up and deliver our best work as a team in order to deliver the best results for the brands that trust us with their marketing budgets.



If you are ready to work and have the skills required, please submit your application directly here:

 marketing

Applications that do not include that sentence may not be reviewed.

title: FBA Wholesale Account Specialist

title: SEO Manager Technical & On-Page for a US Company (Remote and Graveyard)
description:
A) SEO Leadership & Site Optimization (90% of role)

Own SEO strategy execution across the site: on-page SEO, technical SEO, and site health.

Troubleshoot ranking issues and implement fixes independently (e.g., keyword cannibalization, indexing issues, Google algorithm updates).

Monitor tools like SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4 for performance, coverage, and errors; implement solutions quickly.

Maintain on-page SEO: update titles/meta, add internal links, refresh stale content, implement FAQ/schema updates.

Optimize site performance: compress/resize images, lazy-load media, minimize render-blocking assets, and improve Core Web Vitals.

Work with AI tools and automation workflows to enhance SEO and content operations.



B) CRM & Workflow Management (Supportive)

Use CRMs (preferably Go High Level, also familiar with Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho) to manage campaigns, leads, and workflows.

Build and maintain automations/workflows for marketing operations.

Collaborate with tea
mbers to align CRM data with SEO and site performance initiatives.



C) Elementor & WordPress Site Management (5–10% of role)

Convert legacy WordPress pages (Classic Editor/HTML) into Elementor using brand-consistent templates and global styles.

Implement technical hygiene during migration: 301 redirects, canonical tags, sitemaps, no-index where appropriate, fix orphan pages.

Stage/publish new pages or updates; QA for design, SEO, accessibility, and SOP compliance.

Basic troubleshooting of front-end issues with HTML/CSS and Elementor.



D) Collaboration, Compliance, & Standards

Follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes meticulously; suggest improvements proactively.

Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive content with care, particularly in healthcare/behavioral health contexts.

Communicate clearly with tea
mbers and represent the brand professionally.

Work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Required Skills & Experience

4+ years of hands-on SEO experience, particularly with WordPress sites.

Elementor Pro page-building experience.

Strong on-page and technical SEO fundamentals: site architecture, redirects, canonicals, sitemaps, robots.txt, schema basics.

Experience with SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4, and page speed/Core Web Vitals optimization.

Knowledge of Yoast or Rank Math, media optimization, and basic accessibility standards.

Basic HTML/CSS skills for troubleshooting WordPress/Elementor issues.

Organized, detail-driven, and able to follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes.

Clear written communication for documentation and updates.



Nice to Have

Building reusable Elementor templates.

Experience with managed WordPress hosting (WP Engine, 
) and CDNs like Cloudflare.

Familiarity with performance optimization tools (WP Rocket, NitroPack, Screaming Frog, PageSpeed Insights, Looker Studio dashboards).

Experience with healthcare or behavioral health content.



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $9 USD per hour.



Working hours:

4 hours overlap in CST (core collaboration hours).

4 hours fixed Philippine time (must remain consistent each day).

Paid time off: Includes standard US holidays and paid leaves.

Fully remote; virtual collaboration via RingCentral (camera optional except for standups/meetings).

title: Service Desk Technician
description:
Please apply for this job here:







We are Sourcepass, an IT consulting company (MSP) with a rich history of providing network support and innovative solutions since 2001. Our expertise spans IT services, cloud computing, and security, that tailor the right technologies to specific industries and business strategies. Sourcepass aims to be different. It is owned and operated by technology, security, and managed services experts who are passionate about delivering an IT experience that clients love.



Sourcepass has acquired and continues to acquire companies across all avenues of technology bringing more than 40 years of expertise to all of our service areas.



Today, Sourcepass comprises over six hundred employees serving more than two thousand clients across twenty unique vertical markets. And the best is yet to be.



Our achievements speak for themselves: named to the Inc. 2022 Best in Business list, honored with two 2023 Stevie® Awards, listed on CRN’s 2023 Solution Provider 500, and recognized in Gartner’s 2024 Magic Quadrant™. Most recently, we were awarded PAX8's 2024 Partner of the Year and designated as Microsoft CoPilot MVP. We take pride in these accolades and continue to push boundaries in the IT consulting industry.



Join us and be part of our journey toward even greater accomplishments.



POSITION SUMMARY



As a Service Desk Technician, you will be responsible for working closely with our clients, providing advanced Level II IT knowledge, tools, and problem-solving skills to determine, diagnose and solve all IT-related issues. This is a fully remote position Monday through Friday 9am-6pm EST. 



RESPONSIBILITIES



Set up workstations with computers and necessary peripheral devices (routers, printers etc.)   

Check computer hardware (HDD, mice, keyboards etc.) to ensure functionality 

Install and configure appropriate software and functions according to specifications  

Diagnose and maintain local networks in ways that optimize performance

Ensure security and privacy of networks and computer systems

Provide orientation and guidance to users on how to operate software and computer equipment 

Organize and schedule diagnostic testing around client availability to inhibit impact 

Perform troubleshooting to diagnose and resolve problems (repair or replace parts, etc.)   

Maintain records of support interactions and time spent in ConnectWise (communication, diagnostics tests / results)   

Identify and document computer or network equipment warranty issues and communicate them internally.   

Act as a liaison between Vendors and clients for open vendor support requests



DESIRED SKILLSET/EXPERIENCE



Technical Support Experience: 3-5 Years (Preferred)   

Experience working with Azure (A plus)   

Experience working with Office 365 (Preferred)   

Experience working with SonicWall devices (Preferred)   

Experience working with HP Devices (Preferred) 

Ability to communicate effectively

Ability to Prioritize multiple tasks effectively 

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment

Ability to work independently and in a team environment 

Proven Experience as a Technical Support Analyst or relevant position  

CompTIA A+ and Network+ will be required within 1 year of hire.



Microsoft, Apple, SonicWall, Cisco, and other IT vendor certifications desirable.



This is an independent contractor position.

title: SHORT-FORM VIDEO EDITOR + CONTENT GROWTH PRODUCER
description:
PART-TIME ROLE: SHORT-FORM VIDEO EDITOR + CONTENT GROWTH PRODUCER

(Podcast ? YouTube Shorts + Reels ? Subscriber Growth)



Part-Time | Remote| Long-Term Role

Must collaborate closely with our Executive VA



---



### About the Brand



We are a physician-led lifestyle medicine brand producing high-value educational content through a weekly video podcast, membership, and seasonal programs.



The content is strong.



We need someone who can turn it into **engaging short-form video that grows our audience and drives subscriptions—without losing a clean, professional brand feel.**



---



### The Real Goal of This Role



Turn one weekly podcast into a **high-performing short-form content engine** that:



* increases YouTube subscribers

* increases views and reach

* builds trust and authority

* drives viewers back to long-form content



This is not basic editing.



This is about knowing:



* what to clip

* how to hook attention quickly

* how to keep people watching

* and how to convert attention into subscribers



---



### What You’ll Be Responsible For



#### 1. Short-Form Video Creation (CORE FOCUS)



For each weekly podcast episode, you will:



* independently identify the best clips (no timestamps provided)

* create 5–8 high-quality short-form videos

* edit for **tight pacing and strong retention**

* remove dead space and filler

* add clean, minimal **hook text overlays**

* include subtle but clear **calls to action** (follow/subscribe)



Content will be formatted for:



* YouTube Shorts

* Instagram Reels

*
 Reels



**Style requirement:**

Engaging and modern—but still clean, professional, and aligned with a physician-led brand.

(No excessive emojis, distracting effects, or over-editing.)



---



#### 2. YouTube Growth Through Shorts



You will help use Shorts to grow the YouTube channel.



Responsibilities include:



* creating Shorts designed to **increase subscribers and views**

* connecting short-form content to long-form episodes

* understanding what makes viewers stay and take action

* improving titles, captions, and positioning for discoverability



---



#### 3. Reworking Existing YouTube Videos



We have a library of existing long-form podcast videos.



You will:



* review past content

* identify strong segments

* turn them into new Shorts

* use short-form to **revive and grow older videos**



---



#### 4. Light Long-Form Video Cleanup (as needed)



* trim awkward starts/stops

* remove unnecessary pauses

* ensure a clean and professional final product



(No advanced editing required—focus is clarity and polish.)



---



#### 5. Content Awareness + Collaboration



You will work closely with our Executive VA to ensure:



* content aligns with current offers and priorities

* videos support overall marketing goals

* deliverables are organized and completed on time



---



### Tools You Should Know



Required:



* Opus Clips (or similar)

* Canva (for simple overlays/thumbnails)

* YouTube Studio

* Google Drive

* ChatGPT



Preferred:



* Understanding of short-form performance (retention, hooks, pacing)

* Experience with educational or wellness brands



---



### What We’re Looking For



* Strong instinct for **what makes content engaging**

* Ability to **identify great clips without direction**

* Clean editing style with good taste (not overdone)

* Understanding of **retention and pacing**

* Reliable, organized, and able to work independently



---



### This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You rely entirely on AI tools without refining clips

* You need step-by-step direction for every task

* Your editing style is overly flashy or distracting

* You don’t understand how short-form content performs



---



### Hours / Compensation



5–10 hours per week

Flexible schedule (batch-friendly)

Pay based on experience and speed



---



### How to Apply



Please include:



* Short introduction

* Tools you use

* Links to:



  * Shorts/Reels you edited

  * Examples that show retention-focused editing

* Your hourly rate

* Weekly availability



Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Senior Developer – Business Intelligence & ETL Experience in Pharma or CRO
description:
We are looking for a Senior Developer with strong experience in Business Intelligence (BI) and ETL development. This is a full WFH role and will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining data pipelines, data warehouses, and reporting solutions that support business decision making. The ideal candidate has a solid background in data architecture, performance optimization, and transforming complex data into meaningful insights.



Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain ETL processes to extract, transform, and load data from multiple sources

Build and optimize data pipelines and workflows for reliability and scalability

Develop and maintain data warehouse solutions and data models (star and snowflake schemas)

Create and support BI dashboards, reports, and analytics tools

Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions

Ensure data quality, integrity, and consistency across systems

Monitor and troubleshoot ETL jobs and data pipelines

Optimize database performance, queries, and data storage strategies

Implement best practices for data governance, security, and compliance

Mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership

Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field

5 to 8+ years of experience in software development with a focus on BI and ETL

Strong experience with ETL tools (such as Informatica, Talend, or Microsoft SQL Server Integration Services)

Advanced SQL skills and experience with relational databases (SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, etc.)

Experience with data warehousing concepts and dimensional modeling

Proficiency in at least one programming language (Python, Java, or C#)

Experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or similar

Strong problem solving and analytical skills

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform

Knowledge of big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop, etc.)

Experience with data lakes and modern data architecture

Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines

Experience working in Agile environments

title: sub contractor supervisor / job manager US Home improvement
description:

title: App Developer and Automation Expert
description:
Mobile App Developer & Automation Specialist





Madison Group Properties (MGP) is a woman-owned residential real estate brokerage based in Bergen County, New Jersey, operating under eXp Realty. Founded in 2009, we are a boutique, high-touch team built around the mission of Building Beautiful Lives — guiding clients through the biggest financial and emotional decisions of their lives.



We operate with Fortune 500-level systems and a family-owned heart. We are currently in a growth phase and building out our internal tech infrastructure to support our agents and clients at the highest level.



THE ROLE



We are looking for a sharp, self-directed Mobile App Developer and Automation Specialist to join our team full-time. This is a unique opportunity to be the technical backbone of a growing real estate brand — someone who can build, maintain, and automate across our entire tech ecosystem.



You will start by helping us build a proprietary mobile app (iOS and Android) replicating the core functionality of our current client nurture tool, and from there you will own the automation and systems layer of the business.



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD & OWN



-Cross-platform mobile app development (iOS + Android) using React Native or Flutter

-App store submission and maintenance (Apple App Store + Google Play)

-Workflow automations across our full tech stack

-CRM automation and pipeline management inside Follow Up Boss

-Integration builds across GSuite, Slack, Agently, Fello, ShowingTime, and Supra

-Zapier and/or 
 workflow design and maintenance

-Ongoing troubleshooting, updates, and new feature development as the business grows



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



-Proven experience building cross-platform mobile apps (React Native or Flutter preferred)

-Experience submitting apps to Apple App Store and Google Play Store

-Strong knowledge of automation tools — Zapier, 
, or similar

-Experience working with CRM systems (Follow Up Boss or comparable)

-Comfortable working inside GSuite, Slack-based workflows, and API integrations

-Highly organized, communicative, and able to work independently without hand-holding

-Portfolio of past apps or automation builds required

-Real estate industry experience is a plus, not a requirement



TO APPLY — PLEASE ANSWER THESE QUESTIONS



1) Share links to two apps you have built and submitted to the app stores. What was your role on each?

2) What automation tools do you use most frequently and what is the most complex workflow you have built?

3) Have you worked with Follow Up Boss or any real estate CRM? If so, describe what you built.

4)What is your preferred framework for cross-platform mobile development and why?

5)What is your availability, and what is your expected hourly rate?



COMPENSATION



Compensation is flexible and commensurate with experience. We value long-term partnerships and will compensate fairly for the right person. Please include your expected rate in your application.

title: Catalog & Review Executive (Marketplace & Customer Experience)
description:
Catalog & Listing Management

•  Create, upload, and maintain product listings across Amazon US, Amazon India, Walmart US, and Shopify.

•  Ensure accurate titles, bullet points, descriptions, category mapping, and attributes on every SKU.

•  Set up and maintain variation families (size, colour, pack) correctly — no broken parent-child relationships.

•  Monitor and resolve suppressed listings, listing errors, and category/attribute inconsistencies daily.

•  Follow Salt Earth's SKU naming convention consistently across all platforms.

Review Management & Customer Experience

•  Monitor product reviews daily across all platforms — no review goes unread for more than 24 hours.

•  Respond to customer reviews and buyer messages within defined TAT, holding brand tone throughout.

•  Handle negative feedback professionally — acknowledge, resolve, and document every case.

•  Escalate recurring complaints or critical issues to the right internal team with clear evidence.

Review Growth & Reputation Building  (Key Differentiator)

•  Actively drive review volume and average rating improvement — this is a primary output of the role.

•  Execute Amazon Request-a-Review on every eligible order; track weekly execution rate.

•  Run platform-compliant follow-ups and insert-driven review programs — no policy violations, ever.

•  Coordinate with the team on packaging inserts, thank-you cards, and post-purchase touchpoints.

•  Track and grow user-generated content — customer photos and videos on listings and social.

Customer Interaction & Issue Resolution

•  Respond to buyer queries across Amazon, Walmart, and Shopify with a consistent brand voice.

•  Identify patterns in complaints and surface them to Product, Quality, and Catalog teams.

•  Partner with internal teams to fix root causes, not just symptoms.

•  Maintain a clean log of issues, resolutions, and recurring themes for monthly review.

Content & Listing Optimization

•  Flag listings that need better images, A+ content, descriptions, or FAQs based on performance and feedback.

•  Brief the design team on listing creatives and content updates with clear requirements.

•  Audit top SKUs monthly and push continuous improvements to lift conversion.

•  Keep listings aligned with current keyword strategy and competitor positioning.

Platform Issue Handling & Compliance

•  File and manage cases for listing suspensions, IP complaints, category issues, and compliance flags.

•  Track every case to closure — no open tickets older than the platform's SLA.

•  Ensure all listings comply with platform guidelines, textile labeling rules, and brand standards.

•  Maintain a compliance log and proactively flag risk before it becomes a suspension.

title: Manager – Marketplace Growth (E-commerce P&L Owner)
description:
Revenue Ownership & Performance Tracking

•  Own monthly and quarterly revenue targets across Amazon US, Amazon India, Walmart US, and Shopify.

•  Track revenue vs target, SKU-level performance, and platform-wise growth on a weekly cadence.

•  Identify hero SKUs to scale and underperforming SKUs to fix, reprice, or phase out.

•  Run weekly pipeline reviews with the CEO and flag risks early.

Performance Marketing & Ads Management

•  Plan, execute, and optimize Sponsored Ads on Amazon US, Amazon India, and Walmart US.

•  Drive TACOS down and ROAS up through continuous bid, keyword, placement, and creative testing.

•  Allocate ad spend across SKUs and platforms based on margin, velocity, and seasonality.

•  Grow Shopify through conversion optimization, bundles,
 / SMS flows, and paid acquisition.

•  Brief, coordinate, and hold accountable any Meta / Google ad agencies or freelancers.

•  Track CAC, payback, and repeat rate on D2C; push for profitable D2C growth, not vanity revenue.

Cross-Functional Ownership

•  Work with the Inventory team to secure stock on hero SKUs before scaling ads.

•  Align with the Catalog team to ensure listings are optimized (title, images, A+, keywords) before driving traffic.

•  Partner with the Review team to protect ratings on scaling SKUs and resolve issues quickly.

•  Proactively prevent the two most expensive mistakes: stock-outs on scaling SKUs and ads running on suppressed listings.

Growth Strategy & Commercial Inputs

•  Recommend pricing, discount, and bundling strategies by marketplace and season.

•  Benchmark competitors on pricing, keywords, creative, and promotions — feed insights back into strategy.

•  Identify whitespace — new SKUs, new categories, new marketplaces — and build the business case.

•  Propose and run structured tests on pricing, creatives, and bundles; scale winners, kill losers.

Data, Reporting & Decision Making

•  Build and maintain weekly and monthly dashboards covering revenue, TACOS, conversion, and margin.

•  Present insights and action plans to leadership — the work is decisions, not just reports.

•  Maintain clean, auditable trackers for ads, promos, and SKU performance.

•  Turn every number into a 'so what' and a 'next step'.

We are offering a training to become a patent engineer, with good pay from the beginning. After one or two years, this job can turn into an employment in Munich, Germany.



In your application, please indicate which university you graduated from and with what final grades.

title: Virtual Admin & Front Desk (Payments & Scheduling)
description:
We are looking for a Virtual Full-time studio Admin & Front Desk (Payments & Scheduling). You are highly organised and calm-under-pressure individual to join our team at Getlaashed The Studio. This role is critical to the smooth daily functioning of BOTH our SINGAPORE and KUALA LUMPUR outlet, with a strong focus on customer appointment management and payment coordination.



You will be the heart of the studio, managing payments, handling client bookings/scheduling and ensuring a seamless payment experience for our customers. 



This is a fast-paced and detail-oriented job.





GetLaashed The Studio is a Lash-Lift-only beauty studio that specialises in natural-looking, long-lasting lash lifts, no extensions, no fuss!





Start Date: Immediate



2 months Training: $300 USD/mth

3 months Probation: $400 USD/mth

Salary upon clearing probation: $450 USD/mth







Key Responsibilities

* Confirming appointments and schedules using Setmore & WhatsApp for both SG & KL outlet

* Handle payment collection, verification, and follow-ups (SGD & MYR) using Setmore & WhatsApp

* Ensure booking accuracy, correct tagging, and clean system records  

* Monitor and follow-up pending, rescheduled, and incomplete bookings

* Ensure no overlaps, missed payments, or errors

* Create and update customer time table for lash beauticians daily

* Handle client check-ins and check-outs virtually

* Respond to all customer enquiries professionally, calmly, and clearly

* Handle some customer complaints with critical thinking

* Escalate high-risk cases to management appropriately







4 Softwares you will ONLY be using:

* Setmore (appointment scheduling)

* WhatsApp (client communication & follow-ups & payment collection)

* Google Docs (create customer timetable)

* ChatGPT to assist in your replies and check Grammar before responding to customer individually. 





Requirements

* Minimum 1-2 years of experience in client coordination, scheduling, and payment roles

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability

* Extremely detail-oriented and meticulous

* Able to multitask efficiently without losing accuracy

* Calm, collected, and professional under pressure

* Comfortable handling payments and sensitive client information

* Tech-comfortable (booking systems, WhatsApp, basic reporting)

* Able to manage both Singapore and KL operations daily — this is mandatory







What We Expect

* You take ownership, not instructions-only

* You double-check instead of assuming

* You prioritise accuracy & efficiency

* You understand that payments + scheduling = zero room for error





Working Hours

* 5.5-day work week

* 8hrs work per day 

* Weekends work is required

* 1 and half Days Off





Why Join Us

* Work in a fast-growing regional brand

* (Training will be provided)

* Clear systems, SOPs, and structured workflows

*Work from Home





To Apply:



Please answer two questions:



1. Date of Birth:



2. Why are you a strong fit for the role?





Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
We are seeking a dynamic and highly organized Executive Assistant to support the President in managing day-to-day operations, strategic initiatives, and team engagement activities. This full-time role combines administrative excellence with creative and organizational expertise to ensure the business operates efficiently and aligns with its vision. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and passionate about driving results through collaboration and communication.



Key Responsibilities

1. Executive Support

Manage the CEO’s calendar, schedule meetings, and coordinate travel arrangements.

Prioritize and handle
 correspondence, ensuring timely responses and follow-ups.

Assist in preparing for meetings, including drafting agendas, taking notes, and tracking action items.

2. Vision and Engagement Coordination

Track progress on company challenges, key performance indicators (KPIs), and strategic goals.

Prepare and distribute motivational content such as team updates, video scripts, and presentations.

Organize and facilitate team events, including quarterly meetings and one-on-one check-ins.

Develop graphics, templates, and visual materials to support team engagement efforts.

3. Administrative and Operational Support

Maintain organized records of projects, reports, and key documents.

Monitor task management systems (e.g., ClickUp) to ensure deadlines and priorities are met.

Support hiring and onboarding processes, ensuring smooth integration of new tea
mbers.

Assist with office management tasks, including purchasing supplies and coordinating vendor relationships.

4. Communication Hub

Act as a liaison between the CEO and the team, ensuring alignment and clarity in communications.

Facilitate team-wide communications and announcements to keep everyone informed and motivated.

Organize and manage the flow of information for both internal and external stakeholders.

5. Strategic Project Support

Conduct research and compile reports to support strategic initiatives and decision-making.

Take ownership of special projects, ensuring timely completion and high-quality results.

Continuously improve processes to streamline operations and enhance team efficiency.



Skills and Qualifications

Required Skills:

Organization and Time Management: Exceptional ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks and deadlines.

Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to craft professional and engaging materials.

Creative Design Skills: Proficiency in tools like Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar graphic design platforms.

Technology Proficiency: Strong familiarity with tools like ClickUp, Google Workspace, and project management software.

Proactive Problem-Solving: Demonstrated ability to anticipate needs and independently resolve challenges.

Data and Reporting: Experience tracking and analyzing metrics or KPIs, with the ability to present insights clearly.

Preferred Skills:

Experience in executive-level support, project management, or team engagement roles.

Background in accounting, finance, or small business operations (a plus but not required).

Knowledge of QuickBooks Online or other financial tools (a plus).



What We Offer

A collaborative and supportive work environment focused on innovation and growth.

Opportunities for personal and professional development.

Competitive salary.

Flexible work arrangements.

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller / Appointment Setter for U.S. Contractor Leads (EST Hours)

Send a 60-second voice intro, your daily dial/conversation/booking numbers, and your EST availability.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
**Job Title:** Digital Marketing Specialist — Paid Media,
 Automation & Client Delivery



**Reports To:** Principal Advisor, SKOMA Digital (Melbourne, Australia)



---



**About SKOMA Digital**



SKOMA Digital is a boutique Virtual CDO agency based in Melbourne, Australia. We work as embedded growth partners across a focused portfolio of eCommerce and B2B brands — not just service providers. Our work spans Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO,
 automation, HubSpot CRM, and Shopify CRO.



We operate lean, move fast, and hold ourselves to a high commercial standard. Every person on our team owns their lane and is accountable to the results in it.



---



**The Role**



We're looking for a sharp, well-rounded Digital Marketing Specialist to join a small senior team as our primary execution hire. You'll work directly with the Principal Advisor, who sets strategy — your job is to build it right, maintain it consistently, and deliver across three core areas: paid media,
 automation, and day-to-day client delivery coordination.



This is a high-trust, high-ownership role. You won't be micromanaged. You will be expected to perform.



---



**What You'll Be Doing**



*Paid Media*

- Build and manage Google Ads campaigns — Search, Shopping, Performance Max

- Build and manage Meta Ads campaigns — prospecting, retargeting, catalogue, lead gen

- Conduct scheduled maintenance: bids, budgets, negatives, audience hygiene

- QA conversion tracking via GA4, GTM, and Meta Pixel

- Weekly performance reviews with clear commentary




 Automation*

- Build and manage Klaviyo flows: Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Win-Back, and more

- Build HubSpot workflows, sequences, and nurture automations

- Manage segmentation, suppression logic, and list health

- Monitor flow performance and flag issues and opportunities proactively



*Client Delivery*

- Own day-to-day client communication across
 and Slack — prompt, professional, on-brand

- Keep Asana project boards current — tasks, owners, deadlines

- Coordinate deliverables across the team, QA outputs before they reach clients

- Prepare monthly performance report summaries

- Support client onboarding and maintain shared documentation



---



**What We're Looking For**



- 3+ years in digital marketing with hands-on paid media and
 automation experience

- Google Ads proficiency — campaign builds, bidding strategy, Google Ads Editor

- Meta Ads proficiency — Ads Manager, custom audiences, Advantage+ campaigns

- Klaviyo experience — eCommerce flows, segmentation, conditional logic

- HubSpot experience — workflows, sequences, CRM management

- GA4 and conversion tracking setup and interpretation

- Outstanding written English — professional, precise, client-ready

- Highly organised, self-managed, and proactive

- Comfortable representing a brand in client-facing communication



---



**Bonus Points**



- Experience with Shopify-based eCommerce clients

- Familiarity with Google Merchant Centre and product feeds

- Canva or light creative production for Meta ads





---



**Tools You'll Use**



Google Ads · Google Ads Editor · Meta Business Manager · Klaviyo · HubSpot · GA4 · Google Tag Manager · Shopify · Slack · Asana · Google Workspace · Notion



---



**How We Work**



Async-first, with structured weekly check-ins. You'll have direct access to the Principal Advisor, clear briefs for every deliverable, and full visibility into client results. Overlap with AEST and/or US Central timezone (Australian Eastern Standard Time) for at least 4 hours per day is required.

title: Construction Accountant
description:
About Us

Bean Countery is a U.S.-based accounting and advisory firm that works specifically with residential construction companies (roofers, remodelers, contractors).



We are not a traditional bookkeeping firm.



We help business owners:

- understand their numbers

- improve profitability

- gain control over their cash flow



Our work is structured, detail-driven, and high-trust. We value accuracy, ownership, and clear communication.



The Role

We are looking for a Construction Accountant to support our growing client base.



This role is not just data entry.



You will be responsible for helping ensure that client financials are:

- accurate

- complete

- ready for monthly close



You will work closely with a senior tea
mber and gradually take on more responsibility over time.

What You’ll Do

- Review and clean up weekly transaction coding

- Ensure bank and credit card activity is complete

- Assist with monthly reconciliations

- Identify and flag missing or unclear transactions

- Support job costing accuracy for construction clients

- Prepare books to a “ready for review” state



Growth Path

Phase 1 – Support Role: Focus on accuracy and cleanup

Phase 2 – Close Support: Assist with reconciliations and monthly close

Phase 3 – Construction Accountant: Own a set of clients and close books by the 10th



What Success Looks Like

- Transactions are clean and complete each week

- Issues are identified early (not at month-end)

- Reconciliations are accurate

- Work requires minimal correction during review



This Role Is NOT a Fit If

- You rush through work and miss details

- You wait to be told what to do

- You are uncomfortable asking questions

- You rely on guesswork instead of clarity



This Role IS a Fit If

- You are highly detail-oriented

- You take ownership of your work

- You double-check before marking something complete

- You communicate clearly and proactively

- You want to grow into a higher-level accounting role



Requirements

- Experience with QuickBooks Online

- Strong understanding of basic accounting principles

- Experience with reconciliations preferred

- High attention to detail

- Strong written English communication

- Ability to follow structured processes



Schedule & Compensation

- Remote

- Part-time to start (15–25 hours/week)

- Opportunity to grow

- Compensation based on experience and performance



Hiring Process

1. Initial interview

2. Paid test project

3. Final interview



We prioritize accuracy, ownership, and consistency over speed.



How to Apply

- Your experience with QuickBooks Online

- Brief description of accounting experience

- Example of how you ensure accuracy in your work

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: Meta Ads & GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
Meta Ads & GoHighLevel Specialist (Full Ownership Role)



We are a fast-growing marketing agency helping roofing companies generate consistent, high-quality jobs through Meta ads, lead generation systems, and automated sales processes.



We’re looking for a high-level operator to take full ownership of client results — not just run ads.



This is not a beginner or “task-based” role.

You will be responsible for the entire fulfilment pipeline.



Your Role (Full Ownership)



You will take complete responsibility for:



Launching, managing, and scaling Meta ad campaigns for service-based businesses

Building and optimising GoHighLevel funnels, workflows, and automations

Improving lead quality, booking rates, and overall client ROI

Troubleshooting issues across ads, funnels, and CRM

Continuously improving our systems, not just maintaining them

Working closely with the founder to drive performance and scale results



You are not here to “run tasks” — you are here to own outcomes.



What We’re Looking For



You must:



Have strong experience with GoHighLevel (funnels, workflows, pipelines, automations)

Be able to build systems from scratch, not just use templates

Have proven experience running Meta ads for service-based businesses

Understand how to generate qualified leads, not just cheap leads

Be highly proactive and solution-oriented (you solve problems without being told)

Think in terms of ROI, cost per booked call, and revenue, not vanity metrics

Be organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple clients



Bonus (not required):



Experience working with roofing companies or home improvement niches

This Role Is NOT For You If:

You need constant instructions or supervision

You only know how to “boost posts” or follow basic ad strategies

You rely entirely on pre-built snapshots and cannot build your own systems

You avoid responsibility when results are poor



Compensation

$500/month base salary

Performance-based bonuses (based on client results, retention, and growth)

Clear progression into a senior/lead role as we scale



Working Details

Location: Philippines

Hours: UK time (8:30am – 5:00pm)

Work directly with the founder and core team (ads + creative)



Growth Opportunity



We are scaling aggressively to 20–50 clients, and this role will evolve into:



Head of Fulfilment / Team Leader

Managing other media buyers and systems

Playing a key role in the company’s growth



How to Apply



To apply, include:



A short Loom video (2–5 mins) explaining:

Your experience with Meta ads + GoHighLevel

A campaign or system you’ve built that got strong results

Examples/screenshots of:

Ad account performance

GHL workflows or funnels you’ve built

Why you believe you’re a top 10% operator

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: Social Media Content Creator & DM Conversion VA — Health & Wellness Brand
description:
About the Practice

First In Osteopractic Wellness is a cash-based physical therapy clinic in Putnam, Connecticut, USA. Dr. Jared is a fellowship-trained, Army veteran physical therapist. We run one premium offer — a 90-day protocol — and we do not take insurance. Every session is 60 minutes, 1-on-1, with a purpose.



We are growing fast and need a sharp VA to edit our video content, run our social media, and turn online conversations into booked discovery calls.



This Role Has Three Core Pillars

All three are primary responsibilities — not one above the others. Do not apply if you are only strong in one area.



PILLAR 1 — VIDEO EDITING

Receive raw short-form and long-form footage from Dr. Jared and edit into platform-ready content

Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) with strong hooks, precise cuts, and platform-optimized pacing

Edit long-form content (workshops, injury screens, educational sessions) for YouTube and

Add captions, subtitles, and branded on-screen text to every video — required on all content without exception

Deliver content that is platform-spec compliant and post-ready without revision rounds

Primary tool: CapCut Pro — proficiency required



PILLAR 2 — CONTENT POSTING, CAPTION WRITING, REPURPOSING & PAID ADS

Instagram: 3–5 posts per week — Reels, carousels, and static content

: 1–2 posts per day

TikTok: 2–3 posts per day

-Leverage AI tools and content repurposing to maximize output from every piece of raw footage

-Write captions in Dr. Jared’s established voice using provided frameworks and brand guidelines

-Reply to all comments and story interactions daily to build community and trust

-Run and manage paid ad campaigns on
 and Instagram — create ad copy and creative, set targeting, monitor performance, and optimize based on results

-Familiarity with ManyChat — you do not need to build flows, but you must understand how automated DM sequences work so you can pick up conversations where automation leaves off and move leads toward a booked discovery call



PILLAR 3 — DM MANAGEMENT & DISCOVERY CALL CONVERSION

-Run daily proactive DM outreach to warm audiences and avatar-matched profiles

-Manage inbound DM conversations, qualify leads, and move qualified prospects to book a 15-minute discovery call

-Submit a weekly performance report every Friday tracking videos delivered, reach, DMs sent, calls booked, and paid ad spend vs. results



What This Role Is NOT

You are not building strategy from scratch — Dr. Jared owns strategy. You execute it.

You are not managing the GHL/CRM backend — a separate tech VA handles that.

You are not filming content — raw footage is provided to you by Dr. Jared.



Compensation

Base pay: $600–$650/month — rate within this range based on experience and portfolio strength

Performance bonus: $25 per qualified discovery call that is booked by you and shows up — paid monthly based on verified showed calls in GHL

What this looks like at goal: 15 showed calls/month = $375 in bonus on top of base — total earning potential $975–$1,025/month

Content creation is your primary job — DM conversion is the bonus lane. Strong performers in both will earn at the top of this range consistently



Who We Are Looking For

-Proven short-form and long-form video editing experience — portfolio or sample edits required

-CapCut Pro proficiency required — Adobe Premiere or Final Cut experience is a plus

-Experience adding captions, subtitles, and on-screen text to social video content

-Comfortable using AI tools (CapCut AI, ChatGPT, Claude or similar) to assist with content repurposing and caption drafting — AI assists the process, Dr. Jared’s voice always comes first

-Familiarity with ManyChat — you do not need to build or manage flows, but you must understand how automated DM sequences work so you can communicate naturally with leads who come through them

-Paid ads experience required — proven ability to set up, manage, and optimize
 and Instagram ad campaigns for a service-based business; health and wellness ad experience is a strong advantage

-++ IMPORTANT++ Respond with FIOW-READY as subject / opening line of message+++ Applications without this will not be reviewed. 

-Experience running DM outreach campaigns for a service-based business

-Health, fitness, or wellness brand experience is a strong advantage

-Strong written English — you will write in someone else’s voice and tone matters enormously

Available for at least 4 hours of daily overlap with US Eastern Time (EST)

title: Analytical VA — Video Editing + Admin Support
description:
Detail-Driven Analytical VA

Video Production + Admin + Graphics

Remote  |  Philippines-based  |  Full-Time  |  EST Hours



Before you read the task list, read this first.



We are not looking for someone with the longest resume or the most software certifications. We are looking for a specific type of person.



You catch things other people miss.

You follow a process exactly as given — you don't improvise or substitute your own method.

When you finish a task, you review it before anyone asks you to.

You take detailed notes the first time something is taught so you don't need it repeated.

When you hit a problem, you think through it before asking for help.

You take ownership of your output — errors in your work are your responsibility to catch, not your employer's.



If that description sounds like you, keep reading. If it doesn't, this role will be frustrating for both of us.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a growing YouTube-based content business producing talking head and faceless educational videos. This is an operations support role — you will help keep the content engine running cleanly and efficiently.



The role has three areas. They are listed in order of priority:



•  Video editing — this is the core of the role and where your attention to detail matters most

•  Admin and operations support

•  Graphics and visual content



You do not need to be an expert in all three from day one. You need to have the right mindset and be trainable. The workflow for video editing will be taught to you in full. What cannot be taught is the ability to follow it precisely and catch your own mistakes.



VIDEO EDITING — PRIMARY FOCUS

?  This is the most important part of the role. Everything else is secondary to this.

You will edit talking head and faceless YouTube videos using CapCut desktop (Pro version required). You will be trained on a specific 3-step workflow. Your job is to learn it, apply it exactly, and deliver clean videos that do not need correction.



What that looks like in practice:

•  Cut audio, sync video, and QA simultaneously — not separately, not after

•  No words cut off mid-syllable — every word completes fully before a cut

•  No screen jumps — mouse movement must be natural and continuous across every clip

•  No audio gaps — all clips butted directly together on the timeline

•  Audio extracted and managed separately from the video track

•  Complete a QA checklist before every submission — no exceptions

•  Target turnaround: 20-minute video edited and submitted within 4 hours once trained



You do not need years of editing experience. You need CapCut desktop familiarity, a trained eye for detail, and the ability to absorb and apply a workflow the first time it is shown to you.



ADMIN & OPERATIONS SUPPORT

•  Social media research and engagement using provided SOPs

•  Community management — comments, conversation starters, engagement

•  Manage and track tasks in Asana and Slack

•  Update sales systems, lead tracking, and website content as needed

•  Data entry, spreadsheet tracking, and document management

•  Daily and weekly reporting



GRAPHICS & VISUAL CONTENT

•  Create thumbnails and social media graphics using Canva

•  Maintain consistency with brand templates and visual standards

•  Design basic promotional and content visuals as directed



WHO YOU ARE

The best candidates for this role have come from backgrounds that demanded precision — not just creativity. If your prior work required you to get things exactly right with no room for error, you'll fit here.



Backgrounds that translate well:

•  QA or compliance

•  Medical billing or insurance operations

•  Data entry auditing or claims processing

•  Paralegal or legal support

•  Finance, payroll, or bookkeeping

•  Social media management with a strong analytical component

•  Any role where following a system exactly was non-negotiable



You also need:

•  CapCut desktop — Pro/paid version — installed before your start date

•  Availability EST hours — training is 6–9 PM EST, flexible after probation

•  Strong English communication — written and verbal

•  Experience with Asana, Notion, ClickUp, or similar tools

•  Canva experience — thumbnails and basic graphics

•  Reliable internet and a working laptop capable of running CapCut desktop



NON-NEGOTIABLES

If you cannot commit to all of the following, do not apply.

•  CapCut desktop Pro installed and confirmed before start date

•  Available EST hours for training and regular check-ins

•  Follows the taught workflow exactly — no substituting your own methods

•  Takes detailed notes during training — does not ask the same question twice

•  Submits a completed QA checklist with every video

•  Does not submit work with obvious errors — you catch your own mistakes before handoff

•  Able to complete a 20-minute video edit within 4 hours once trained and independent



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 with the subject line:

, in this exact order:

title: Real Estate Acquisitions
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

 us at:
