title: Experienced AI Avatar Video Editor
description:
We produce high-volume AI-generated short-form videos for multiple brands and are looking for a skilled, reliable AI video editor who can consistently deliver daily output.



This is not a beginner role. You should already have hands-on experience creating AI avatar or product-style videos.



What You’ll Do

Write or refine prompts for consistent, high-quality outputs

Create 5–7 short-form AI videos per day

Edit and assemble content using AI tools + CapCut

Follow brand references and replicate styles accurately

Deliver on time, every day (6 days/week)



Requirements (Must Have)



Proven experience with: HeyGen, Veo, ElevenLabs, CapCut

Strong prompt writing skills (Claude / ChatGPT)

Portfolio of AI avatar or AI-generated videos

Ability to maintain consistent daily output (5–7 videos/day)

Fast turnaround, detail-oriented, and reliable



Compensation



$500/month base + bonus 

Expected output: 5–7 videos/day minimum

Pay will be prorated if minimum output is not met

Performance bonuses available for high quality and high volume





Trial Task (Required)



To be considered, you must complete 1 sample video based on our instructions.



Only applicants who submit a sample will be reviewed

This helps us evaluate your actual skill level



How to Apply

Please include:

Portfolio or samples of AI-generated videos (avatar or product style)

Tools you’ve used and your experience level

Confirmation that you can meet 5–7 videos/day consistently

title: PART-TIME EDITOR WANTED — ECOMMERCE BRAND | META ADS | DIRECT RESPONSE | LONG-TERM
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We run a growing direct-to-consumer comfort footwear brand selling in the US market. Our ads run exclusively on
 and Instagram — and video is the core of everything we do.



We're looking for a part-time video editor who genuinely understands how Meta ads work — not just technically, but strategically. You know what makes someone stop scrolling. You know the difference between a hook that works and one that doesn't. And you can feel when a video is edited the right way for a direct response audience.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Every day I provide 3 new scripts, raw UGC footage, and B-roll. Your job is to turn these into finished, ready-to-run Meta ads — each script gets 3 hook variations.



Daily output: 3 NET new videos (3 hook variations each, so 9 video’s total)

I provide: script, UGC footage, B-roll

You handle: edit, captions, text overlays, pacing, and sourcing any footage gaps



This is consistent, high-volume daily work. If you can't commit to daily delivery, this role isn't for you. If you can — and you're fast and good — this is a long-term position with steady income.



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

— Proven experience editing video ads for eCommerce brands on Meta

— Strong understanding of direct response marketing: hook, problem, solution, CTA

— Ability to source supplementary organic-looking footage yourself

— Clean captions, sharp pacing, and edits that feel native to a
 feed

— Reliable daily communication and consistent on-time delivery

— Portfolio showing real eCommerce ad edits (required to apply)



PAY STRUCTURE

Per set (1 main edit + 3 hook variants = 1 set)

+ Monthly flat allowance for footage sourcing and minor revisions

Rate based on experience. Consistent daily output = consistent income. Long-term for the right person.



HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY

To be considered, your application must include two things:



1. Your portfolio — a Google Drive link with at least 5 Meta-style video ads you've edited for eCommerce brands. Showreels don't count.



2. Complete the screening task — All instructions are in the link below. Read the brief, write a 45–60 second video ad script based on it, and paste it directly in your application.



Screening task: 
 



Applications without a portfolio link and completed script will not be reviewed. Strong applicants move to a short video call.



No agencies. Long-term only. Flexible hours, fully remote.

title: Remote Takeoff Estimator/Quality Control Rep-Work From Home (STRUCTURAL)
description:
We are currently looking to add to our growing team. We are a USA-based takeoff & estimating service company. This position is for remote in-house estimators/Quality Control Reps. Please read the job details and respond accordingly to our questions to be considered. Thank you!



We are looking for Immediate Hire:



Position 1: Structural Estimators like wood/Lumber package, steel framing, and metal framing





Job Details-You will be performing takeoffs and some quality control tasks



1. Full-time work available and even over time based on Performance & Quality Of Work-We can offer stable consistent work to the right person (Full Time Preferred)

2. Some training is provided but must have prior experience

3. Must have 5+ Years of experience

4. Must have an engineering or architectural degree or equal estimator experience

5. Must Speak English

6. Must have Planswift Software (No Exception, please don't apply if you don't have this software)

7. Must have good math skills

8. Must be able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

9. Must know how to use Microsoft excel

10. USA takeoff experiences a PLUS but not necessary

11. Must be a team player

12. Must be able to work daytime EST

13. Must be able to work some weekends, depending on workload

14. Must be very responsive

15. Must be reliable and available during your shift.



We have a base starting pay rate per this job post, if you prove your skills we do offer pay raises and bonuses. We also have many management positions to which you can be promoted to.



****To be considered please send the following answered questions****



1. Have you read the job description above thoroughly and can you comply with most requirements?

2. Do you have experience in Lumber Framing and Drywall? This area is particularly busy for us, so any experience would be PLUS. Please elaborate.

3. Tell us about your related experience

4. What is your area of expertise?

5. Why should we hire you?

6. Do you have a home office?

7. How is your internet Speed?

8. How many years of actual takeoff and estimating experience do you have? with US experience?

9. What is your availability and how soon can you start?

title: Senior Google Ads & SEO Specialist (Shopify Expert) – Multi-Million USD E-commerce Company (Norway Market)
description:
We are a fast-growing, highly profitable Norwegian e-commerce company specializing in premium used and refurbished phones, tablets, laptops, and other electronics. We operate exclusively in the Norwegian market and already generate millions of USD in annual revenue. Our Shopify store is our main sales channel, and we are now looking to significantly scale our digital marketing performance.

We need someone truly exceptional — not a generalist, but a proven performer who has already driven results for multi-million dollar businesses.

The Role

You will take full ownership of our Google Ads and SEO strategy. Your goal is clear: deliver high-ROI traffic, increase conversions, and directly grow our revenue in Norway. This is a high-impact, high-accountability role where your work will be measured by results.

Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize full-funnel Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Display) with a strong focus on ROAS and profitability.

Lead on-page, technical, and content SEO to dominate Google rankings in the Norwegian market.

Continuously test, analyze, and scale campaigns to maximize revenue while keeping acquisition costs low.

Work directly on our Shopify store — implement tracking, improve conversion rate, and integrate marketing tools.

Provide clear monthly reporting with actionable insights to the founders.

Stay ahead of Google algorithm changes and new advertising opportunities.



What We’re Looking For (Non-Negotiable Requirements)



Proven experience running Google Ads for multi-million USD revenue companies (you must be able to show previous campaigns, results, and client references or employer verification).

Minimum 4–5+ years of hands-on experience in Google Ads + SEO for e-commerce.

Deep expertise with Shopify (theme optimization, apps, conversion tracking, etc.).

Exceptional written and spoken English (this is mandatory — you will communicate directly with the founders).

Strong analytical skills and data-driven decision making.

Ability to work independently and deliver results with minimal supervision.

Bonus: Experience in the Norwegian market, electronics/refurbished goods, or Norwegian language skills (not required but a big plus).



Compensation

We offer a very competitive package:



Attractive flat monthly salary (based on your proven track record)

AND/OR high commission based on performance/results (we are very open to a strong commission-heavy structure for the right person)



The right candidate can earn significantly above market rate because we reward results, not just hours.

Location

Fully remote (you can work from anywhere, as long as you have excellent internet and can align with Norwegian business hours when needed).

How to Apply

Only serious, high-caliber candidates will be considered.

Please send your application to my whatsapp: 
with the subject line: “Google Ads & SEO Specialist – Norway”

Include:



Your updated CV/resume

A short cover letter explaining why you are the right person for this role

Portfolio or case studies showing Google Ads campaigns you have personally run for multi-million dollar companies (with results and ROAS figures)

Examples of Shopify stores you have worked on



We will only reply to candidates who clearly meet the requirements above.

If you have successfully scaled Google Ads and SEO for big-ticket e-commerce brands and are ready to take on a high-growth opportunity with a company that already does millions in revenue, we want to hear from you.

Looking forward to seeing your application.



Feel free to contact me on Whatsapp for fast respons:

title: Duda Website Builder (Part-Time) – Long-Term Growth Role
description:
We are looking for a skilled Duda Website Builder to join our team part-time and help us design, build, and deliver professional websites for small and medium businesses.

You will work primarily under:




 ? Marketing, lead generation, and digital growth agency serving USA, New Caledonia, Vanuatu, and the Pacific Islands





Our Mission

Build high-quality, conversion-focused websites that help local businesses grow their online presence — fast, reliably, and at scale.



Your Role

You are not just dragging and dropping blocks — you are crafting complete, polished web experiences for real clients.

You will:



Build responsive, mobile-optimized websites using Duda

Create custom layouts using the Duda Widget Builder — configuring settings, styling precisely, and combining widgets to produce designs that go beyond basic templates



Structure scalable content using Duda Collections — setting up fields, connecting dynamic pages, and using content injection for team pages, service listings, portfolios, location pages, etc.



Deliver stylish, modern designs — clean aesthetics, intentional color palettes, sharp typography, well-balanced whitespace, and a premium feel

Optimize pages for SEO (meta titles, descriptions, heading structure, image alt text, schema markup, clean URLs)

Ensure accessibility compliance — proper contrast ratios, alt text, keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, meeting ADA, WCAG 2.1, and European standards (EAA / RGAA for French territories)



Integrate forms, maps, chat widgets, booking tools, and third-party embeds

Follow structured briefs and content documents to deliver pages accurately



Manage and organize assets (images, logos, copy) inside each Duda project

Stay current with Duda — follow release notes, blog, and community forums. When Duda ships something new, you assess it and bring it to our attention



Communicate progress clearly and flag blockers early





What We're Looking For

This is not a beginner role. We need someone who can take a brief and deliver a complete, client-ready site with minimal hand-holding.



You must:



Have hands-on Duda experience (strong preference)



Have a strong design sense — color theory, modern typography, visual hierarchy, whitespace. We will judge your portfolio on style, not just functionality



Understand web accessibility and legal compliance — ADA requirements, WCAG 2.1 guidelines, and European accessibility obligations. We serve clients in both the US and French Pacific markets — every site must meet standards for both regions

Be detail-oriented — pixel-level polish matters

Communicate clearly in English





Bonus Skills (Strong Advantage)



Experience with Duda's API and connecting collections to external data sources, CRMs, or automation tools

Ability to build custom interactive widgets (accordions, tabs, before/after sliders, animated counters)

Basic HTML/CSS for custom code widgets



Design trend awareness — you follow Dribbble, Behance, Awwwards, or similar

Google Search Console / Google Analytics setup

Canva or Figma for light image editing/asset prep



Understanding of conversion optimization (CTA placement, trust signals, above-the-fold structure)

Experience running accessibility audits with WAVE, axe DevTools, or Lighthouse

Knowledge of GDPR cookie consent and privacy policy requirements for European/French territory websites

Bilingual English/French is a plus





Schedule & Commitment



Part-time: approximately 15–20 hours per week to start

Hours are flexible, but we expect reliable delivery

Potential to grow into more hours and a full-time role as volume increases





What You Get



Long-term, stable position with a growing agency

Clear, structured briefs — no guessing what the client wants

Exposure to real client projects across multiple industries

Flexible working hours





Mindset & Culture Fit (VERY IMPORTANT)

We are not looking for someone who just builds what's asked and stops. We are building a serious web design operation and we want someone who wants to be part of it.

What this looks like:



You spot issues (broken spacing, inconsistent fonts, missing mobile tweaks) before being told

You suggest improvements: "This section would convert better if we moved the CTA above the fold"

You treat every site as if it were your own business's website

You take ownership from start to delivery — you're proud to say "I built this"

You don't wait for instructions on obvious fixes — you just handle it

You want to grow with the company long-term



If you are only looking for one-off gigs, this role is not for you.

If you want steady, long-term work building real websites for real businesses — we want to hear from you.



TO APPLY

Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.

Please include:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with Duda 

Links to at least 3 websites you have built with Duda. For each site, briefly explain:



What the client's business was

What you were responsible for (design, content, collections, SEO, etc.)

One design or technical decision you made and why





A screen recording or video walkthrough (even 2–3 minutes is fine) of one of your best builds — show us the Duda editor, how you structured the site, how you used widgets and collections. This is the fastest way to stand out. (Loom, Google Drive link, or YouTube unlisted all accepted)

How you approach building a website from a brief (your process, step by step)

What you would improve on this sample site: [insert sample URL here]



?? Generic applications with no examples = automatic rejection. We want to see your actual work — not a list of skills. Show us, don't tell us.



Start your application with: "Website Mango Builder"



We are looking for serious, detail-oriented, and proactive candidates only.

title: Finance & Bookkeeping Specialist (Xero) Stayful | Remote | Part-time
description:
Rate: $6 per hour | Hours: ~10 per week | Payment: Weekly via Wise



Entities covered: Stayful Ltd and Stayful Bookings Ltd



About Stayful

Stayful is a UK-based property management company specialising in short-term and medium-term rentals. We manage approximately 60 properties across multiple UK locations, operating across Airbnb, 
, Uplisting, and direct channels. Our business handles a high volume of guest payments, platform payouts, owner disbursements, and property expenses across two separate Xero entities.



Role Overview

The primary goal is to ensure both Xero accounts are always up to date, fully reconciled, and clearly reported. At any point we need to clearly understand: our cash position across all bank accounts; platform payouts received vs confirmed bookings; funds belonging to property owners vs Stayful operations; P&L and balance sheet; and our VAT and tax position.



Key Responsibilities



Initial Backlog Cleanup -- clearing unrecorded bank activity (Allica, Monzo, Revolut, AMEX), resolving suspense account entries, reconciling platform control accounts (Airbnb, 
, Uplisting), and tidying AR/AP aging. This is within your weekly hours, not charged separately.



Daily Bookkeeping and Reconciliation -- bank transactions, categorisation, matching platform payouts to booking reports, reconciling the client control account for owner funds.



Cash Position Reporting -- daily report showing total cash received, cash allocated to bookings, owner funds, and Stayful operating funds.



Booking Revenue Tracking -- match platform payouts to booking reports, identify delayed or missing payouts, monitor expected payouts from confirmed bookings.



Expense Tracking -- cleaning, maintenance, supplies, software, operational costs, correctly coded and allocated.



Financial Reporting -- daily cash position, weekly cashflow overview, monthly P&L and balance sheet.



Tax Tracking -- monthly VAT liability across both entities, corporation tax provisions, directors' loan account balance, compliance risk flagging.



Tools: Xero, Google Sheets, 
/Uplisting payout reports, Slack and
.



Essential Skills: 2+ years bookkeeping experience, strong Xero hands-on experience, multi-account bank reconciliation, platform payout structures, attention to detail, independent remote working, good written English.



Desirable: Short-term rental or property management experience, 
 payout familiarity, UK VAT knowledge, cashflow reporting experience.



All applications must be submitted via our application form. Do not apply directly through the platform you found this advert on. Applications submitted outside the form will not be considered.



Apply here: 



The form includes a short written application. Please read all instructions carefully before completing it. The job reference is STAY-BK.

title: Funnel Builder & Designer
description:
About Daily Media Group:

Daily Media Group is a dynamic media company specialising in creating and marketing our own digital and physical products. Our product range includes online courses, educational workbooks, and physical journals designed to help our customers achieve their personal and professional goals. We are looking for a talented Funnel Builder & Designer to join our team and help us create high-converting sales funnels that drive growth and maximise revenue.



Role Overview:

As our Funnel Builder & Designer, you will be responsible for designing, building, and optimising sales funnels using ClickFunnels as our primary platform. You will work closely with our marketing team to create compelling landing pages, sales pages, and complete funnel sequences that convert visitors into customers. This role requires both technical proficiency and creative flair, with a strong understanding of what makes people click, engage, and buy.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Design, build, and maintain high-converting sales funnels using ClickFunnels

2. Create visually appealing and user-friendly landing pages, sales pages, opt-in pages, and thank you pages

3. Implement and manage A/B testing strategies to continuously improve conversion rates

4. Analyse funnel performance metrics and provide data-driven recommendations for optimisation

5. Collaborate with the marketing team to develop compelling copy and messaging for funnel pages

6. Integrate funnels with
 marketing platforms, payment processors, and other third-party tools

7. Build upsell, downsell, and order bump sequences to maximise average order value

8. Stay current with industry best practices, ClickFunnels updates, and conversion optimisation trends

9. Ensure all funnels are mobile-responsive and provide an excellent user experience across devices



Requirements:

1. Minimum 2-3 years of hands-on experience building and designing sales funnels

2. Proven proficiency with ClickFunnels (this is our primary platform – experience is essential)

3. Strong portfolio demonstrating previous funnel work – you must be able to show examples of funnels you have built

4. Solid understanding of direct response marketing principles and buyer psychology

5. Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimisation (CRO)

6. Basic understanding of marketing copywriting and what makes copy convert

7. Strong eye for design with the ability to create professional, brand-consistent pages

8. Ability to interpret analytics data and translate insights into actionable improvements

9. Excellent attention to detail and ability to work independently



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with other funnel platforms (Kajabi, Kartra, Leadpages) is a plus

- Copywriting skills or experience working with direct response copy

- Knowledge of
 marketing platforms (ActiveCampaign, ConvertKit, Mailchimp)

- Understanding of paid advertising 
 Ads, Google Ads) and how funnels integrate with ad campaigns

- Experience with Stripe, PayPal, or other payment gateway integrations

- Familiarity with digital product launches and evergreen funnel strategies

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge for custom styling



What We Offer:

- Flexible working arrangement – part-time or full-time positions available

- Remote work opportunity with flexible hours

- Competitive compensation based on experience

- Opportunity to work on diverse projects across multiple product lines

- Collaborative and creative team environment

- Room for growth as our company expands

- 13th month pay

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive AI Automation Specialist to join our team on a part-time basis. In this role, you will serve as the chief architect of our internal systems, responsible for auditing our entire business operations and identifying opportunities to streamline, optimize, and automate workflows using cutting-edge AI technology.



Your primary goal is to make our operations simpler, faster, and more efficient, ultimately allowing us to deliver superior results to our clients. You will not just execute tasks; you will proactively design the systems that execute tasks.



Key Responsibilities

•Comprehensive Business Audit: Conduct a deep-dive analysis of our current standard operating procedures (SOPs), marketing funnels, and client fulfillment processes to identify bottlenecks and manual inefficiencies.

•System Architecture & Automation: Design, build, and maintain complex automation workflows to eliminate repetitive tasks across the business.

•GoHighLevel Mastery: Manage and optimize our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM, including building advanced pipelines, automated
/SMS sequences, appointment scheduling, and AI-driven lead nurturing systems.

•AI Agent Integration: Deploy and manage advanced AI tools, specifically Manus and Claude Code, to automate complex, multi-step workflows, research, and data processing tasks.

•Continuous Improvement: Actively monitor system performance and proactively suggest new AI tools, software features, or workflow adjustments to improve operational efficiency and client outcomes.

•Documentation: Create and maintain clear, step-by-step documentation for all automated systems and workflows built.



Required Skills and Qualifications

•Proven experience as an Automation Specialist, Systems Architect, or highly technical Virtual Assistant.

•Expert-level proficiency in GoHighLevel (GHL). Official HighLevel Certifications (e.g., Certified Admin) are highly preferred.

•Demonstrated experience utilizing advanced AI agents and coding assistants, specifically Manus and Claude / Claude Code, for workflow automation.

•Strong understanding of API integrations, webhooks (Zapier/Make), and system connectivity.

•Exceptional analytical and "systems thinking" skills; ability to visualize complex processes and simplify them.

•Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

•A highly proactive, self-directed work ethic. You must be comfortable taking ownership of projects and presenting solutions rather than waiting for instructions.



How to Apply

Click Apply Now and submit a brief video introduction and a portfolio or case study of a complex automation workflow you have successfully built on here or to

title: Detail-Driven Video Operations VA
description:
Detail-Driven Operations VA

Video Production + Admin + Graphics

Remote  |  Philippines-based  |  Full-Time  |  EST Hours



Before you read the task list, read this first.



We are not looking for someone with the longest resume or the most software certifications. We are looking for a specific type of person.



You catch things other people miss.

You follow a process exactly as given — you don't improvise or substitute your own method.

When you finish a task, you review it before anyone asks you to.

You take detailed notes the first time something is taught so you don't need it repeated.

When you hit a problem, you think through it before asking for help.

You take ownership of your output — errors in your work are your responsibility to catch, not your employer's.



If that description sounds like you, keep reading. If it doesn't, this role will be frustrating for both of us.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a growing YouTube-based content business producing talking head and faceless educational videos. This is an operations support role — you will help keep the content engine running cleanly and efficiently.



The role has three areas. They are listed in order of priority:



•  Video editing — this is the core of the role and where your attention to detail matters most

•  Admin and operations support

•  Graphics and visual content



You do not need to be an expert in all three from day one. You need to have the right mindset and be trainable. The workflow for video editing will be taught to you in full. What cannot be taught is the ability to follow it precisely and catch your own mistakes.



VIDEO EDITING — PRIMARY FOCUS

?  This is the most important part of the role. Everything else is secondary to this.

You will edit talking head and faceless YouTube videos using CapCut desktop (Pro version required). You will be trained on a specific 3-step workflow. Your job is to learn it, apply it exactly, and deliver clean videos that do not need correction.



What that looks like in practice:

•  Cut audio, sync video, and QA simultaneously — not separately, not after

•  No words cut off mid-syllable — every word completes fully before a cut

•  No screen jumps — mouse movement must be natural and continuous across every clip

•  No audio gaps — all clips butted directly together on the timeline

•  Audio extracted and managed separately from the video track

•  Complete a QA checklist before every submission — no exceptions

•  Target turnaround: 20-minute video edited and submitted within 4 hours once trained



You do not need years of editing experience. You need CapCut desktop familiarity, a trained eye for detail, and the ability to absorb and apply a workflow the first time it is shown to you.



ADMIN & OPERATIONS SUPPORT

•  Social media research and engagement using provided SOPs

•  Community management — comments, conversation starters, engagement

•  Manage and track tasks in Asana and Slack

•  Update sales systems, lead tracking, and website content as needed

•  Data entry, spreadsheet tracking, and document management

•  Daily and weekly reporting



GRAPHICS & VISUAL CONTENT

•  Create thumbnails and social media graphics using Canva

•  Maintain consistency with brand templates and visual standards

•  Design basic promotional and content visuals as directed



WHO YOU ARE

The best candidates for this role have come from backgrounds that demanded precision — not just creativity. If your prior work required you to get things exactly right with no room for error, you'll fit here.



Backgrounds that translate well:

•  QA or compliance

•  Medical billing or insurance operations

•  Data entry auditing or claims processing

•  Paralegal or legal support

•  Finance, payroll, or bookkeeping

•  Social media management with a strong analytical component

•  Any role where following a system exactly was non-negotiable



You also need:

•  CapCut desktop — Pro/paid version — installed before your start date

•  Availability EST hours — training is 6–9 PM EST, flexible after probation

•  Strong English communication — written and verbal

•  Experience with Asana, Notion, ClickUp, or similar tools

•  Canva experience — thumbnails and basic graphics

•  Reliable internet and a working laptop capable of running CapCut desktop



NON-NEGOTIABLES

If you cannot commit to all of the following, do not apply.

•  CapCut desktop Pro installed and confirmed before start date

•  Available EST hours for training and regular check-ins

•  Follows the taught workflow exactly — no substituting your own methods

•  Takes detailed notes during training — does not ask the same question twice

•  Submits a completed QA checklist with every video

•  Does not submit work with obvious errors — you catch your own mistakes before handoff

•  Able to complete a 20-minute video edit within 4 hours once trained and independent



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

•  $3–5 USD/hour based on experience and performance ($2.50 per hour during traning)

•  Paid weekly

•  13th-month pay

•  Monthly performance bonuses for exceeding KPIs

•  Annual retention bonus review

•  Performance-based raises

•  Promotion path — top performers can grow into team lead and management roles

•  Ongoing skill development — AI tools, social media, writing, video editing, and more

•  Stable, long-term employment with clear SOPs, systems, and feedback



HOW TO APPLY — FOLLOW EVERY STEP



Attention to detail starts with how you apply. Applications missing any step will not be reviewed.



Send an
 to 
 with the subject line:

"Applying To – Operations VA – [Your Name]"



Include ALL of the following in your
, in this exact order:



1. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

2. Resume as a PDF

3. A 1–2 minute intro video: tell us who you are, your relevant background, and why your attention to detail makes you the right fit for this role specifically

4. A video editing sample — a talking head or faceless video you have edited. No sample = no consideration

5. Confirm you have CapCut desktop Pro installed and ready to use

6. Confirm you are available to work EST hours

7. Write the word FALCON at the end of your
 to confirm you read this posting in full

title: Hiring: High-Level NFL Motion Graphics Editor
description:
The Role:

I am looking for a technical video editor to produce 1:1 replicas of the Football Digest style. 
 I provide the full script, the voiceover, and the raw game footage. Your job is purely the visual breakdown and motion graphics. 



The Style:

This is "Film Study" content. Every play needs to be dissected visually. If you don't understand football concepts (blitzes, coverages, route trees), this is not the role for you.



The Trial (Free 15-Second Intro):

To ensure a technical fit, I require a 15-second sample of an intro based on assets I provide.



Goal: Prove you can match the Football Digest pacing and graphics.



Focus: Telestration, motion tracking, and high-retention visuals.



Technical Checklist for the Edit:



Advanced Telestration: Pulsing player circles, route arrows, and zone boxes.



Planar Tracking: Labels and graphics must be "stuck" to the turf (using Mocha or similar tracking software). Static, floating text is a fail.



Visual Pacing: The play must be manipulated (speed ramps, freeze-frames) to sync perfectly with the voiceover.



Style Match: Clean bold fonts, professional color-coding (Offense vs. Defense), and high-quality "spotlight" overlays.



How to Apply:

If you can execute the technical graphics seen in the examples, message me for the 15-second trial assets.

title: Youtube Long-From Video Editor
description:
I am looking for a part-time video editor to complete very simple reaction video edits. 



What I need:

- Consistent availability every week (I need someone reliable for 1-2 days per week)

- Open to a paid test edit before we commit

- Tell me your best rate for per video, each video takes 30 minutes or less to complete. 

- Have done reaction content?



The reaction videos that I produce are very simply edited on Capcut. I would provide detailed instructions and once you have the system each video should take you around 30 minutes or less. In one hour you should be able to complete 2 or 3 videos an hour. 



I will pay only with PayPal. I will pay the same day that I receive and expect the edited videos. I will not pay for a video until it is completely edited without corrections. 



I want someone who is eager to work towards building something long-term. 



I do NOT want someone who makes this an extra job for me. I simply want to send the raw videos and receive the edited version. In the beginning I expect there to be a few questions, but the work should be streamlined very quickly.

The ideal candidate will bring extensive experience in Java, microservices architecture, and performance tuning, along with the leadership skills to mentor a growing development team and steer complex projects to success.



Key Responsibilities

Application Design & Development



Architect, design, and develop high-performance, scalable Java-based e-commerce applications.

Implement microservices and event-driven architectures to ensure modular and resilient systems.

Performance Optimization & Scalability



Monitor, analyze, and optimize system performance, memory usage, and throughput.

Troubleshoot concurrency, threading, and performance bottlenecks using advanced profiling tools and techniques.

Technical Leadership



Mentor junior and mid-level developers, setting best practices in coding, testing, and deployment.

Drive architectural decisions and technology choices aligned with business needs and industry standards.

System Integration



Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and services to enhance platform capabilities.

Implement caching solutions (e.g., Redis, Memcached) and messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ, Kafka) for efficient data handling.'



Quality Assurance & Testing



Champion test-driven development (TDD) and continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD).

Write and maintain robust unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using frameworks such as JUnit, TestNG, and Mockito.

DevOps & Deployment



Collaborate with DevOps teams to automate builds, deployments, and monitoring (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, Docker, Kubernetes).

Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and seamless scalability in production environments.

Security & Compliance



Enforce secure coding practices, including data encryption, OAuth/JWT-based authentication, and compliance with PCI-DSS/GDPR where applicable.

Continuously monitor and mitigate security vulnerabilities and threats.

Documentation & Collaboration



Produce clear, comprehensive technical documentation and architectural diagrams.

Work cross-functionally with product managers, QA, UX designers, and other engineers to deliver robust solutions within agile sprints.



Continuous Improvement



Stay current with emerging trends, tools, and technologies to evolve and enhance our software development lifecycle.

Propose and implement improvements to optimize code quality, productivity, and operational efficiency.



Note: Please send a link to your updated CV, no uploaded CV will not be entertained.



Qualifications:



5+ years of professional Java development experience, ideally on large-scale e-commerce or SaaS platforms.

Demonstrated success in building and deploying microservices, distributed systems, and event-driven architectures.

Technical Expertise



Java Proficiency: Strong command of Java 8+ features (Streams, Lambdas), concurrency, memory management, and JVM internals.

Frameworks & Libraries: Advanced experience with Spring Boot, Spring Data, Spring Security, Hibernate/JPA.

API & Integrations: Experience creating RESTful APIs, integrating third-party services, and working with GraphQL (preferred).

Database Systems: Hands-on experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB; adept at writing complex queries and optimizing database performance.

Messaging & Caching: Practical knowledge of message brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka) and caching systems (Redis, Memcached).

Build & CI/CD: Proficiency in Maven/Gradle, Git, Jenkins/GitLab CI, Docker, and Kubernetes for seamless development and deployment.

Testing: Expertise in TDD, unit testing, integration testing, and test automation frameworks like JUnit, TestNG, and Mockito.

Performance Monitoring & Profiling: Familiarity with tools like VisualVM, YourKit, or New Relic for troubleshooting and tuning.

Soft Skills



Leadership: Demonstrated ability to mentor developers and influence technical direction.

Collaboration: Excellent communication skills, capable of working effectively with product owners, designers, and cross-functional teams.

Adaptability: Thrives in a fast-paced, agile environment, reacting quickly to changing requirements.

Problem-Solving: Proven analytical mindset and a pragmatic approach to solving complex challenges.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Social Media Strategist & Digital Designer
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Marketer who pairs a deep understanding of social psychology with high-level Graphic Design and AI-driven workflows. This role is specifically focused on dominating
 and Instagram—moving beyond "posting content" to strategically engineering engagement.

You should be an expert in the distinct cultures of Meta’s platforms, knowing exactly how a design should differ between a high-intent
 Group post and a high-aesthetic Instagram Carousel.



Key Responsibilities

1. Platform-Specific Strategy

• Meta Mastery: Execute growth strategies tailored specifically to
 and Instagram algorithms to maximize organic reach and engagement.

• Strategic Planning: Develop content pillars that align with the audience behaviors of each platform (e.g., community building on FB, visual storytelling on IG).

• AI Implementation: Use Generative AI tools (like Gemini, and ChatGPT) to brainstorm campaign concepts, generate unique imagery, and optimize copywriting at scale.

2. Graphic Design & Visual Assets

• High-End Design: Create thumb-stopping static assets, including infographics, branded carousels, and promotional graphics using Canva or  Adobe Photoshop.

• AI-Assisted Design: Leverage AI to enhance photos, expand backgrounds, and generate custom textures or elements that set our brand apart from stock imagery.

• Layout & Typography: Ensure every post maintains a premium feel with professional-grade layout, color theory, and typographic hierarchy.

3. Marketing & Community Dynamics

• Audience Psychology: Craft captions and visuals based on what triggers shares, saves, and comments.

• Conversion Focus: Understand the "Customer Journey", using social media to move followers from the feed to our website or lead forms.

• Competitive Analysis: Monitor shifts in Meta’s ecosystem (new features, interface changes) to keep our brand ahead of the curve.

Job Title: Social Media Strategist & Digital Designer (FB + IG Focus)



Position Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Marketer who pairs a deep understanding of social psychology with high-level Graphic Design and AI-driven workflows. This role is specifically focused on dominating
 and Instagram, moving beyond "posting content" to strategically engineering engagement.

You should be an expert in the distinct cultures of Meta’s platforms, knowing exactly how a design should differ between a high-intent
 Group post and a high-aesthetic Instagram Carousel.



Key Responsibilities

1. Platform-Specific Strategy

• Meta Mastery: Execute growth strategies tailored specifically to
 and Instagram algorithms to maximize organic reach and engagement.

• Strategic Planning: Develop content pillars that align with the audience behaviors of each platform (e.g., community building on FB, visual storytelling on IG).

• AI Implementation: Use Generative AI tools (like Gemini, Midjourney, or Adobe Firefly) to brainstorm campaign concepts, generate unique imagery, and optimize copywriting at scale.

2. Graphic Design & Visual Assets

• High-End Design: Create thumb-stopping static assets, including infographics, branded carousels, and promotional graphics using Adobe Photoshop.

• AI-Assisted Design: Leverage AI to enhance photos, expand backgrounds, and generate custom textures or elements that set our brand apart from stock imagery.

• Layout & Typography: Ensure every post maintains a premium feel with professional-grade layout, color theory, and typographic hierarchy.

3. Marketing & Community Dynamics

• Audience Psychology: Craft captions and visuals based on what triggers shares, saves, and comments.

• Conversion Focus: Understand the "Customer Journey", using social media to move followers from the feed to our website or lead forms.

• Competitive Analysis: Monitor shifts in Meta’s ecosystem (new features, interface changes) to keep our brand ahead of the curve.



Required Experience

• 2+ Years of dedicated social media marketing experience for brands or agencies.

• Design Portfolio: Must demonstrate a clean, modern aesthetic with a focus on static social media assets (Carousels, Feed Posts, Ads).

• Strategic Thinking: Ability to explain the why behind a design choice based on marketing data, not just "because it looks good."





Ideal Candidate Profile

You are a "Creative Scientist." You love the art of a perfectly designed Photoshop layout, but you are equally obsessed with the data of why one post outperformed another. You don't fear AI; you use it to produce a week's worth of high-quality content in a fraction of the time.

title: Experienced Google Ads & Meta Ads Account Manager (Multiple Accounts))
description:
Looking for your next opportunity to do meaningful, high-impact paid advertising work? We're a growing U.S.-based digital marketing agency managing paid advertising across Google and Meta for a diverse roster of clients - e-commerce brands, local service businesses, law firms, real estate, nonprofits, and more. We need a skilled ads manager who can jump in and start managing client ad accounts.



What You'll Be Doing:



You'll be managing multiple client ad accounts across Google Ads and/or Meta Ads. Day-to-day work includes campaign builds, optimization, budget management, audience targeting, ad copy/creative collaboration, and performance reporting. The focus is always on driving real business results - leads, sales, ROAS - not vanity metrics.

You'll get to work across a range of industries, so the work stays fresh and your experience keeps growing.



Who We're Looking For:



We're looking for someone who already knows the platforms well and is excited to put their skills to work. You should be comfortable independently managing campaigns, spotting opportunities, diagnosing issues, and making smart optimization decisions. Specifically, we'd love to see hands-on experience with campaign setup and structure across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and/or Meta (Advantage+, retargeting, full-funnel setups). A solid understanding of conversion tracking (Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel/CAPI) is important, along with a results-first mindset (you optimize toward cost per lead, cost per acquisition, and ROAS), not just impressions and clicks. Experience managing multiple accounts in an agency or freelance setting and strong communication skills round things out.



Bonus Points For:



Experience with Google Merchant Center, Shopping feeds, CallRail or call tracking platforms, landing page feedback/CRO thinking, or Klaviyo/email platform familiarity.



Why Join Us:



Your work will directly impact the success of the businesses we serve, and that's something we take a lot of pride in. We believe in clear communication, mutual respect, and giving our team the autonomy to do their best work. We value people who take ownership, and we reward that with trust and room to grow.

As we continue to expand, there's real opportunity here to take on larger accounts, develop your skills across new verticals, and step into a senior or leadership role within the team.



To Apply:



I'd love to hear from you. Please tell me about your experience managing Google and/or Meta ad accounts. Include specific examples of results you've driven (leads generated, ROAS achieved, cost per acquisition improvements, etc.). If you have any case studies or screenshots, even better.

Thank you!

title: Property Manager / Tenant Placement Agent
description:
We are seeking a hands-on Property Manager / Tenant Placement Agent to oversee daily property management and tenant placement for a growing single-family rental portfolio with a strong emphasis on Section 8 and voucher-based tenants.



This role combines leasing, compliance, field coordination, and ongoing asset care. The ideal candidate is highly organized, responsive, understands and/or is willing to learn all HUD/Section 8 processes, and treats investor-owned assets with urgency and professionalism.



This is not a passive, rent-collection-only role. Execution, communication, professionalism and accountability are mandatory.



Core Responsibilities

-Tenant Placement & Leasing

-Market vacant properties (MLS, portals, Section 8 channels, local resources)

-Manage inquiries, showings, and applicant screening

-Process Section 8 applications, RTA packets, and documentation

-Coordinate inspections, re-inspections, and approvals with housing authorities

-Execute leases and ensure proper move-in documentation and deposits

-Maintain consistent leasing standards across the portfolio



Property Management & Operations

-Serve as primary point of contact for tenants

-Coordinate maintenance and repairs with vendors and field staff

-Enforce lease terms, rent collection, and compliance requirements

-Conduct move-in, move-out, and periodic property inspections

-Manage turnovers efficiently to minimize vacancy

-Track and resolve tenant issues professionally and promptly



Compliance & Reporting

-Ensure compliance with local, state, and Section 8 regulations

-Maintain accurate property and tenant records

-Track rent portions (tenant vs housing authority)

-Provide regular updates on vacancies, inspections, delinquencies, and issues

-Flag problems early and escalate when needed



Communication & Coordination

-Communicate clearly with ownership, asset management, and internal teams

-Coordinate with contractors, inspectors, and housing authorities

-Represent ownership professionally to tenants, agencies, and vendors

-Keep deals and placements moving without being chased



Required Qualifications

-Understanding of leasing, inspections, and compliance

-Excellent organizational and follow-up skills

-Ability to manage multiple properties and vacancies simultaneously

-Professional written and verbal communication

-Comfortable using property management software and digital systems



Preferred (Not Required)

-Experience managing investor-owned single-family portfolios

-Experience working with turnkey or rental acquisition teams



What Success Looks Like in This Role

-Prompt, professional and constant communication to the landlords

-Vacancies filled quickly with qualified tenants

-Section 8 inspections pass on first 

-Minimal surprises for ownership

-Clean records and clear communication

-Properties remain protected, compliant, and rentable



Why Join Us

-Stable, growing rental portfolio

-Clear systems, expectations, and support

-Opportunity to grow with the company

-Performance-based incentives tied to occupancy and execution





Application Instructions: Applicants must submit a resume and a short video (2–3 minutes) explaining their background, relevant experience, and why they are a strong fit for managing a high-volume Section 8 portfolio. Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Creative Strategist
description:
Our creative output is one of the biggest drivers of performance.



Right now, we need someone who can own the thinking behind our creatives; not just what looks good, but what actually works and scales.

We don’t need someone who throws random ideas or follows trends blindly.



We need someone who can:

- Break down what’s working and why

- Generate clear, testable angles and hooks

- Guide designers with strong direction

- Continuously improve creative strategy based on performance



This isn’t about making ads.

 It’s about d
 what ads should be made and why.



— Andy Gray, Founder & CEO



IMPORTANT Please read below before submitting your application.



In the application form, you'll be required to submit a 2-minute video introduction answering: Who are you, and why do you think you're the best fit for this role?



You'll also be asked a few short written questions. If your video checks out, we'll invite you to interview.



In your application, use the Code: 8000 applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



WHO WE ARE

The Graygency is a performance marketing agency working with 7–8 figure DTC e-commerce brands across the UK, US, and UAE. We call ourselves Performance Scientists; we're in the P&L, not just the ad account. We're building an agency powered by systems, AI, and commercial thinking, not headcount.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO

Creative Strategy (Core Role)

- Develop creative testing roadmaps across multiple brands

- Generate angles, hooks, and messaging based on audience and product

- Break down winning and losing creatives to extract insights

- Identify patterns in performance and translate them into new ideas



Creative Direction

- Brief designers with clear, actionable direction

- Ensure creatives align with strategy and campaign goals

- Collaborate closely with Media Buyers on performance feedback

- Maintain quality and consistency across all creative output 



Performance Analysis

- Review ad performance (CTR, CPA, hook rate, etc.)

- Diagnose why creatives are or aren’t working

- Use insights to iterate and improve future creatives

- Think in terms of testing, not one-off ideas



Continuous Improvement

- Stay up to date with trends, hooks, and formats across platforms

- Continuously refine creative frameworks and approaches

- Proactively bring new ideas and opportunities to the team



The Skills We Need You To Bring

- 2–5 years experience in creative strategy, performance marketing, or similar

- Strong understanding of paid social (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

- Familiarity with tools like Meta Ads Manager, TikTok Ads, etc.

- Proven ability to generate high-performing creative ideas

- Strong understanding of: Hooks, Angles, Messaging, Customer psychology

- Ability to analyze performance and extract insights

- Strong communication and ability to clearly direct creatives

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote environment



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience working with designers and creative teams

- Copywriting experience (especially for ads)

- Experience in e-commerce or DTC brands

- Experience with AI tools for ideation and research



What Success Looks Like

- Creatives contribute to improved performance (CTR, CPA, engagement)

- High volume of testable creatives produced consistently

- Fast turnaround and iteration speed

- Strong collaboration within the pod

- Creative ideas are proactively contributed; not just executed



Red Flags (Don't Apply If…)

- You rely on trends without understanding why they work

- You struggle to explain your thinking clearly

- You focus on aesthetics instead of performance

- You wait for direction instead of generating ideas

- You don’t think in terms of testing and iteration



What We Offer

- Competitive salary (based on experience)

- Paid public holidays and leave

- Direct collaboration with experienced Media Buyers and Strategists

- Ongoing training and development

- Clear progression into senior strategy roles

- Opportunity to work on global e-commerce brands



Our Culture

We believe in doing things well at The Graygency; we are constantly looking for ways to innovate and improve the delivery of our product. Every day we turn up and deliver our best work as a team in order to deliver the best results for the brands that trust us with their marketing budgets.



If you are ready to work and have the skills required, please submit your application directly here:

title: Klaviyo Flow Specialist (PH Based)
description:
Position Overview



We’re looking for a Klaviyo Flow Specialist who can own the strategy, buildout, and optimization of automated
 flows for our portfolio of Shopify-based DTC clients. You’ll be responsible for mapping customer journeys, building segmentation, setting up flows from scratch, and ensuring every automation is performance-optimized and on-brand.



Requirements/Experience:



- 2+ years of hands-on experience working in Klaviyo



- Deep understanding of customer lifecycle and retention marketing for eCommerce brands



- Strong technical skills within Klaviyo: automation logic, segmentation, A/B testing, dynamic blocks, triggers, working with their support team, etc.



- Experience building and optimizing flows like: Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Checkout, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, Win-back, and Loyalty flows



- Strong experience with Shopify, including how to use event data and customer properties in Klaviyo



- Ability to develop strategy and confidently present flow audits and recommendations



- Experience collaborating with copywriters and designers to bring flows to life



- Strong understanding of KPIs like open rates, CTR, revenue per flow, and deliverability



- Detail-oriented and comfortable managing multiple client accounts at once



Common Traits We Are Seeking:



- Technical thinker with creative instincts



- Deeply organized and meticulous with quality control



- Self-motivated and able to take initiative without constant oversight



- Comfortable working within a larger retention team 
 marketers, designers, copywriters)



- Clear communicator who can explain strategy and logic to internal teams and clients



- Enjoys identifying inefficiencies and turning them into optimized automations



Our Core Values



- Uncompromising Excellence

- Extreme Ownership

- Integrity Above All

- Results Driven Focus



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



- Build, launch, and optimize
 flows in Klaviyo across multiple DTC brands



- Own the entire customer journey via
 automations - from strategy to execution



- Develop segmentation strategies and conditional logic to create personalized experiences



- Conduct account audits and implement best practices to increase performance



- Partner with copywriters and designers to ensure content aligns with strategy



- Monitor and report on performance regularly, providing strategic recommendations



- Troubleshoot issues within Klaviyo and proactively improve deliverability and flow efficiency



- Stay current with Klaviyo updates, industry trends, and platform capabilities



Apply today to join our team!



Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP
